title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text: Manuel Antonio Beach is absolutely stunning. The waves were putting on a show, horses were casually walking down the shoreline like they owned the place, and even the hermit crabs seemed to be enjoying the vacation. The scenery looks like a postcard but with better sound effects. Just be prepared the ocean may lovingly throw you around a few times before welcoming you. Would definitely come back!

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
Um an den Strand zu kommen, muss man ein Ticket für den Nationalpark online kaufen. Wir haben 5 Tage im voraus buchen müssen auf SINAC, weil alles andere ausverkauft war. Ein Ticket kostet 16 Dollar.
Der Strand hat uns an einige Strände auf Mallorca erinnert. Wer die Insel kennt, weiß was ich meine. Wir sind hier direkt wieder weg, nachdem wir viele Tiere im Park gesehen haben und zu einem unberührten Strand an der Pazifikküste gefahren (ohne Eintrittsgebühren).
Der Strand ist bestimmt ganz toll, wenn nicht so viele Menschen da wären.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
Plage de Manuel Antonio absolument magnifique ! Un vrai décor de carte postale avec du sable blanc, une eau turquoise et la jungle tout autour.
L’ambiance est unique, on se retrouve entre mer et nature, avec parfois des animaux à proximité comme des singes ou des paresseux.
L’eau est calme et agréable, parfaite pour se baigner et se détendre. C’est un endroit idéal pour profiter d’un moment exceptionnel au cœur du parc.
Je recommande vivement de venir tôt pour profiter du calme et de la beauté du lieu avant l’arrivée du monde.
Un véritable petit paradis !

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text: Manuel Antonio Beach is absolutely spectacular! With its soft white sand, crystal-clear turquoise water, and lush rainforest reaching right down to the shore, it feels like a true tropical paradise. The beach is clean, well maintained, and perfect for swimming, relaxing, or simply enjoying the stunning scenery. Wildlife sightings are an added bonus — monkeys, sloths, and colorful birds make the experience even more special. The atmosphere is peaceful yet vibrant, ideal for couples, families, or solo travelers. It’s one of those rare places where nature, beauty, and serenity come together perfectly. An unforgettable destination and a must-visit when in Costa Rica. 🌴🌊✨

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text: For me one of the best beaches in whole Costa Rica for relaxing and especially swimming. It is part ot the national park of Manuel Antonio so you really need to book your tickets in advance. If there are sold out there is another possibily to enter. You can go directly to the main entrance of the national park and book a guided tour. I would generally recommend a official tour guide to see the animals in the park. Without it is really hard to see. After the tour you can stay all day long at the beach. So dont forget your swim things. Attention!!! On the way (street) to the parking slot you will be stopped by many people. They act (show an fact id) like they are tour guides from the national park but they are not offically. They try to sell you tours 2 to 3 times more than the offically prices. Be aware of this and dont buy tickets there. You can easily do this at the main entrance (also when online is sold out) or online.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
TOURIST SCAM EVERYWHERE!!
THEY make the entrace to the park almost impossible, people want to sell you tours+tickets for crazy prices outside and block you the road. You can only buy a ticket online (which is very stupid, I don't understand why they don't sell the tickets in the park itself and this whole system of scams outside the park wouldn't be operating) the problem is the tickets are all sold out because tour guides and scammers buy all of them 2-3 prior the date and they resell it outside. Only way we could get in is to buy the tour because they would not let us in.
And then is the process to get in the park; is usseles and completely unnecessary, all the "no plastic bottles" is ridiculos because when I got in the beach I saw two plastic bottles there. Also, you do not have to get a guide ( don't  let the scammers make you), jut bring binoculars and look where the people gather, most of them are nice and will tell you where to look.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
The park itself is beautiful, but the staff behaved terribly.

First, we had to wait in line under the sun while the staff at the bag check and ticket entrance moved like sleepy — or even dying — flies. They were all about “Pura Vida” — fine, but this was just careless.

Then, our 3-year-old wanted to buy a coconut right outside the entrance. We weren’t allowed to enter the park with it — okay, fair enough — but we also weren’t allowed to throw it away in their eco trash bin. I had to leave and walk half a block just to throw away a damn coconut.

And then came the most absurd part: at the beach, our toddler caught a tiny crab and released it. A security guard saw this and tried to kick us out of the park. It was ridiculous and humiliating. We tried to calmly explain ourselves, but the guard called in three more people over the radio — none of whom spoke English — and all four of them started escorting me, my husband, and our small child out of the park. They followed us all the way to the exit.

Honestly, there’s no need to visit this place for the animals — you’ll see sloths, toucans, monkeys, crabs, and iguanas on any Manuel Antonio  beach. And as for spotting anything else — I doubt there’s much more to see inside anyway.

Playa Blanca, located not far from Jacó, is far more beautiful — the water is calmer, the sand is whiter, and the scenery is much more impressive. So no, I absolutely don’t recommend paying to be treated this way.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
Pros: we saw three sloths, several monkeys up close, lizards, parrots, insects and crabs. Without a guide.

Cons: lots of people, bad facilities and terrible and expensive shop/restaurants.

Advice: go early or go late, avoid the crowds. Do not get a guide, we saw everything without a guide and if you walk past a crowd of people just look where they are looking, guides are very friendly and often pointed stuff out to us. Bring your own reusable water bottle. Do not bring food or drinks, they will get taken at the gate. Do not pay for parking, it’s a scam, just park on the street there is plenty of space. Book online do not pay through companies. Bring binoculars.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
Manuel Antonio in general is not a place I would recommend any tourist travelling to anymore.
The beach might be beautiful but it has become such a tourist-scam where restaurants / tours etc. have become insanely expensive.
Tour guides are buying all the tickets sold on “SINAC” at least two days before so that tourists are forced to pay c. 80-100$ for a tour as they can no longer go to the park without a tour guide.
People are rude as well and I simply don’t see the point of going here any longer and support this behavior, there are just as beautiful beaches all around central america with a much better and authentic experience and less scam.

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
¡Manuel Antonio Beach: un paraíso en Costa Rica!

Sin lugar a dudas, una de las mejores playas que puedes visitar en Costa Rica. Este lugar lo tiene todo: aguas cristalinas, arena blanca, naturaleza exuberante y una atmósfera de tranquilidad incomparable. Además, está rodeado por el Parque Nacional Manuel Antonio, ideal para explorar senderos y avistar vida silvestre.

Los invito a que vengan y disfruten de este paradisíaco destino. Perfecto para relajarse, hacer snorkel, tomar fotos increíbles o simplemente conectar con la naturaleza. ¡Un lugar que no se pueden perder!

#ManuelAntonio #CostaRica #PlayasParadisiacas

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text: Manuel Antonio is a must see when visiting costa rica. Its one of the most beautiful national parks in the world honestly. There are many animals around from monkeys, insects, snakes and alot more we probably didn’t even see. I recommend if you want to do the whole park in one day to NOT GET A GUIDE. We didn’t get a guide and im glad because unless you are a HUGE animal enthusiast and by animal i mean small insects its not worth it they stop every few steps with a scope to see an insect or maybe a bird like a woodpecker and you never finish the park. Also they only go along the main trail which is a big road and they dont do the side trails all way. I say this because there are guides outside pressurizing you to use them like you are missing out on something. Nonetheless guide or not you are going to love this place it all depends what you are looking for in this beautiful park. ARRIVE EARLY & ENJOY!(Buy tickets in advance aswell and use alltrails for the trail route)

title: Playa Manuel Antonio
text: This beach has next level beauty. The Pacific has an emerald hue here. It gets very busy however, as it is attached to the most popular National Park in Costa Rica. My advice would be to go early and before your tour of the National Park to avoid the crowds. I visited here after the tour, and as the park rangers police this beach, they very forcefully make sure you are on your way home by 4pm. They blow their whistles loudly and continuously, which is kind of annoying. It does not take away from the stunning unspoiled natural beauty of this place. There is no plastic allowed on entry which is great, so you will be relieved of your plastic water bottle should you have one. They allowed me to bring my snorkelling gear in thankfully. The water is lovely and clear, so there is fish to see, but I ran out of time to really make the most out of that, due to that 4pm cut off. The sand is lovely and soft with a tint of black in there. There are also rinsing facilities and toilets behind the beach. The black iguanas co-exist side by side with people on this beach, that it becomes the norm after a while. Be careful of the many capuchin monkeys who will appear out of the rainforest, and are determined to steal your small items if given the chance.

Там всегда стоит много машин, чтоб пройти на пляж Чикита по тропе через джунгли. По этой тропинке идти минуты 2, дошли до пляжа искупались, вернулись через 2 часа. Увидели, что дверь закрыта, но погнута. И это на главной дороге, днем в 12 часов! Хорошо, не успели взять все. Это все произошло по наводке кого-то рядом точно, машин было полно, но взломали нашу.  Будьте осторожны!

text: Playa Chiquita es una de las playas más hermosas que he visitado en Costa Rica. Sus formaciones rocosas albergan corales, lo que la convierte en un lugar perfecto para practicar snorkel y capturar fotografías impresionantes del paisaje. title: Playa Chiquita
text: A hidden gem in Costa Rica. Inaccessible by road, you have to walk a trail through the rainforest to get to this beach which makes it all the more enchanting. I spent time over Christmas 2023 and New Year in this very area, and visited this secluded beach every day to soak up the tranquillity. The jungle lines the sand which provides shade from around lunchtime onwards. As it's hidden away it seems nobody visits here and you become quite attached to your own private beach. The Caribbean Sea is so clear here, so ideal for swimming and snorkelling. We carried body boards through the jungle on our 1st day, but the waves were too small for that, so I wouldn't bother. During swell season, the rip tides are no joke so be very careful. Every day, around a half an hour before sunset, a handful of Great Green Macaws fly over the beach, heading homewards for the evening. You could set your watch to it. What an amazing sight, although you will definitely hear them before you see them. This sight also makes the locals very happy, as only 10 years ago there was none of these magnificent birds left in the wild in this area. Conservation and a reintroduction program in the Puerto Viejo area have successfully brought these back from the dead and it is a joy to hear their calls over the sound of the waves while sitting on this beach. You can also see lots of other wildlife activity on the jungle walk to here - namely 3 different types of toucans which seem plentiful. Another world! This is the perfect place to escape the corporate grind and clear your mind.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Playa chiquita is a small beautiful beach that provides a wonderful setting for morning walks. Sadly a pack of 5 dogs that are known by locals for their viscous attacks on other dogs, cyclists and walkers live nearby just off the beach. This morning while walking alone my wife was bitten in the back of her leg requiring a visit to the local clinic. It is beyond belief that their owners have not been held accountable. If you do go to this beach bring a large stick, watch for groups of dogs, don't let the dogs get between you and the ocean and be particularly careful if you have pets of your own or small children. We are filing a formal complaint. Others should do the same.

Lots of signs warning of rip tides so best not to swim, but there are lots of rock pools to paddle in. The tide seemed to come in quite quickly, so choose where you sit carefully!

title: Playa Chiquita
text:
BEWARE of major rip currents during the swell season. Beautiful beach but my daughter and husband came near death from drowning.
They are very experienced swimmers and my husband is a life guard and jiu-jitsu coach who is very physically fit, aware of rip current dangers and protocol when caught in one. My daughter was swept out by a wave in thigh deep water into a major rip current when my husband was swimming only a few feet away. She was swept out nearly 60 feet within seconds. We are so grateful they survived. Please swim with extreme caution even in shallow water.

text: Super splendid place to stay. Even better if you are into spirituality. The BLUE is present. Near Mer des Caraïbes, as well as the Jungle !

title: Playa Chiquita
text: You'll be hard-pressed to find a more gorgeous beach than Playa Chiquita. This beach is named after its location on the shore of the Gulf of Nicoya, which means "small port" in English and is said to be one of the most beautiful beaches in all of Costa Rica. There are few hotels or restaurants in Playa Chiquita but tons of options in nearby Puerto Viejo.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Totalmente imposible encontrar la entrada tal mente chica que solo los que viven aquí saben además esta casi todo privado que no se puede pasar.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Me encanto este lugar. Muy tranquilo y bonito para relajarte todo el día.

title: Playa Chiquita
text:
Playa chiquita es un mix de mar y floresta Co agua trasparente verde y cielo Azul brillante.
No smag!

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Hermosa Playa arena blanca rodeada de naturaleza, se debe caminar a pie un sendero de 200 mts rodeado de selva. Mar tranquilo. Recomiendo dejar el vehículo en algun lugar cercano y llevar poca cosa para disfrutar del lugar.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Demaciado linda

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Playa alejada del núcleo urbano y la carretera. En marea baja se forman unas pozas divertidas. A veces bastante corriente pero no cubre mucho, es segura. Por lo demás paradisiaca.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: В пешей доступности, у берега есть кораллы, но можно выбрать место для купания.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Perfecto para snorkeling

title: Playa Chiquita
text: A beautiful beach on the coast of the Caribbean Sea in the Atlantic Ocean. The coast is lined with palm trees, trees and jungle, in the crowns of the trees you will come across howlers and parrots. The beach is sandy, gentle entry into the ocean, not very strong waves. Very quiet place, if you want to be alone, just walk a little along the beach and find a place without people. An unforgettable experience. Amazing place.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Lugar muy tranquilo para ir con la familia y amigos

title: Playa Chiquita
text: Hermoso lugar y su tranquilidad.

title: Playa Chiquita
text: I stayed at the Secluded beach resort bungalows(directly across from the Shawandha Lodge) that have direct beach access down a beautiful nature filled path.  It was the most beautiful and exciting walk each morning I got up around 6am and I would stroll down the beautiful path and encounter tons of wildlife.  Each morning I was surprised by the sights: awesome sloths 🦥 howler monkeys 🙊 spider monkeys 🙉 hummingbirds birds 🐦 butterflies 🦋 a guinea pig like creature, and a small snake 🐍.  Not to mention the crystal clear blue ocean and super soft golden sand, amazing coral reefs(but be careful 4 Rip currents).  Playa Chaquita had very strong Rip currents that gave me a real scare while I was snorkeling the reefs.  Its so easy to let your guard down when mesmerized by the hundreds of exotic fish swimming in schools in between the coral reefs.  So many tropical 🐠 I would snorkel for hours on that beach.  By the way I was there Oct 12-19th 2022 and the weather was perfect.  I would move there in a heartbeat 💓.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: La comida es rica! Pero tuve que pedir mi bebida 3 veces.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Después de 1 mes recorriéndome toda Costa Rica. Puedo decir con total seguridad que el restaurante Mi Finca es el mejor restaurante con diferencia de todos. Aquí he desayunado muchas veces, y he almorzado otras cuantas, y da igual lo que pidas que todo está bueno, es imposible fallar.
Hay que probar obligado el lolito de res, sabor y calidad de la carne exquisita, y por supuesto el mejor pinto que puedes probar, una suerte haber podido disfrutar de la comida tica en este restaurante, porque es comida hecha por la mama o la abuelita de la casa de Costa Rica.
Además el servicio y el ambiente son de 10.
Es de obligada visita, si es posible varias veces para poder probar toda la comida posible de Costa Rica si estas por aquí.
Me declaro fan del Restaurante mi Finca.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Durante muchos años, este restaurante era mi parada obligatoria cuando iba a Guanacaste, pero ya va 2 años seguidos que me ha ido fatal. Ayer pasé esperando que hubiera mejorado, pero el gallo pintó era casi incomible, la calidad de la comida por el suelo!!!! Tristemente, para nunca más!!

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Restaurante Mi Finca in Limonal, Guanacaste, is an ideal spot to slow down over breakfast and a good cup of Costa Rican coffee. The morning menu is straightforward and comforting, made with fresh ingredients and served in generous portions. What truly elevates the experience is the setting—scarlet macaws frequently pass overhead or gather nearby, adding color and life to the early hours. Between the calm rural atmosphere, reliable food, and freshly brewed coffee, Mi Finca feels like a genuine countryside breakfast stop where nature and everyday Costa Rican life meet.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: It is primarily a bakery restaurant in an area that acts like a rest area on a highway.  It has all kinds of croissants, sandwiches, an ice cream.  The other attraction at this location are a pair of playful Macaws that reside in a tree behind the restaurant, amusing tourists with their telephoto cameras.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: 5 stars for everything. The food was amazing. One of the best casados we’ve ever had. The juices were delicious. The staff was amazing…they brought a cup and plate specifically for our baby daughter. We sat outside in the pet friendly section and listened to the sound of the macaws. Beautiful atmosphere. We could not have chosen a better place to stop during our roadtrip.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Precioso lugar, la comida deliciosa y las lapas, hacen del sitio una parada obligatoria.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: The local fauna can be seen from this point. Very good food specially chicharrones and costilla.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy buena comida, las tortillas del casado muy buenas.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Very nice with great view

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: This is a good place to stop half way to San José o Guanacaste. Nice staff but little in the menu to choose from. Coffee js good though and sometimes you can see macaw hybrids from the restaurant.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Belle place bien situé pour une pause entre deux points. Nourriture simple mais efficace. Point supplémentaires, des aras en liberté derrière.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy buena atención y ambiente. Excelente relación precio / calidad

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: just wanted some coffee they got my order wrong snd took them forever , not coming back here

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Tourist trap! Pedimos 2 pintos con huevo, jamon y un plato de frutas. Las frutas no estaban maduras. El gallo pinto todo quemado y para rematar traia un pedaso de salchichon tan pequeño que mejor ni lo hubieran puesto. Todo esto por nada mas y nada menos que 15000 colones (sin contar las frutas que devolvimos)

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: No muchas variedad

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buena comida y precio cómodo. Les recomiendo el gallo pinto Guanacasteco.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Netter Service wir konnten hier zweimal Aras sehen.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Heerlijke broodjes en zoete gebakjes aan de Route 1

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Gutes Essen, etwas teurer.  Wir haben dort Pause gemacht auf dem Weg vom Rincon de la Vieja zum Strand. Zu der Zeit im Juli als wir dort waren, hielten sich nicht viele Gäste dort auf.  Die Papageien konnten wir dort beobachten. Es befindet sich ein netter Souvenirladen direkt neben dem Restaurant.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Meh. Not bad, but not worth writing home about. Good prices and portions. Def better than the Taco Bell next door! Yummy bean dip. Being lunch time the birds must have all been taking their siesta…we only saw a couple from very far away.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Visita Junio 2025: La vez anterior visitamos la parte de la cafetería y nos gustó mucho,  esta vez visitamos el restaurante porque estábamos antojados de un pinto y nos gustó mucho ! Los precios accesibles, y estaba rico, pinto guanacasteco !. La atención del señor que nos atendió fue ESPECTACULAR. Que señor y que amabilidad de verdad. Soy alérgica al huevo y sin tener que pedirle el favor que me cambiara la proteína ya el me estaba dando todas las opciones por iniciativa. Normalmente tengo que pedir el favor y muchas veces no acceden y debo pagar adicional. Eso se agradece, no por el dinero si no por la intención y la atención.

Creo que ya lo elegimos como lugar fijo para desayunar.

Visita Mayo 2025: Íbamos para Tamarindo e hicimos parada aquí para desayunar. Me gustó el lugar, es bastante agradable. Con mucha naturaleza, amplio parqueo y baños limpios. La atención fue buena y la comida también estuvo bien.

Los precios están bien, nada exagerado.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buen sitio para comer en ruta en un cruce estratégico. Precios razonables y buena cantidad. El plátano que llevan los casados va con miel, lo cual es una gran idea. Excelente.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Deliciosa comida, porciones buenas y buen sabor.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buen lugar para visitar

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Un excelente lugar para pasar a comer, la comida excelente, los precios un poquito más altos de la media sin ser exageradamente caro, pero vale mucho la pena, la calidad justifica el precio, super recomendado,

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Wild life with food

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: We had a delicious lunch here! The food was very tasty and cooked fresh . Especially beef steak ! It was the best we had in Costa rica so far

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Stopped here for lunch and ordered the Taco de Alambre de Pechuga de Pollo which is really just a fancy way of calling it chicken fajitas. Fajitas, at least the Mexican style, normally conjure up images of sauteed chicken with generous portions of onion and bell pepper. I don't know if this is the Costa Rican style but in any case I found one small slice of bell pepper and one small piece of onion. Fortunately, I ordered a side order of salad and that solve the issue at hand. IMO, it is somewhat overpriced. The service was good.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Lugar amplio y limpio, con bastante parqueo. El desayuno estuvo muy bien, porciones grandes y buen sabor. La atención fue buena y el ambiente es tranquilo.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Lindo ver las Lapas en los árboles

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy concurrido, muchos turistas y precioso la naturaleza al ver los guacamayos

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Great pit stop loc on the way to/from San Jose. Pricey coffee, tho. I ordered outside the menu- iced coffee- and had to pay $1 more for the ice part! Like they just made that up.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: El hotel está bien. No  tiene piscina propia, pero en cambio tiene transporte gratuito a otro hotel de la cadena. Para moverte en la zona se necesita taxi (que es bastante caro) o un uber que es más asequible. El desayuno variado y bueno. Las recepcionistas fueron muy amables en todo momento.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Gemütliche Lodge in ruhiger Umgebung mit schön angelegtem Garten. Monteverde ohne Motorisierung schlecht erreichbar. Das nächste Dorf, St. Elena, fussläufig ohne weiteres zu erreichen. Es gibt einige schöne und gute Restaurants in der Nähe mit gutem Preis- Leistungsverhältnis. Die hoteleigene Küche ist lecker. Die Menuekarte ist ausreichend.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: La comida es muy rica , el servicio es bueno son amables y precios razonables pero lo único malo las 2 ocaciones que fuimos habían muchísimas moscas  es lo único malo

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Pongo una estrella porque no se puede poner menos.
Nada más hicimos el check in y entramos a la habitación notamos un olor a humedad y a cerrado super fuerte, no se podía estar allí dentro. Nos cambiamos y fuimos a recepción a decirlo, nos dijeron que pasaría el chico de mantenimiento a revisar.
Nos marchamos a cenar y al volver y tumbarnos en la cama, era insoportable, no se podía respirar, era tal la humedad que el baño estaba mojado.
Decidimos directamente reservar otro hotel y marcharnos, ya que no había nadie en recepción a las 21.0 pm.
Al volver por la mañana a recoger las cosas y dejar la llave, se lo decimos que vamos a cancelar la otra noche y únicamente nos dice que lo entiende y que lo lamenta mucho.
Honestamente, el hotel tiene problema de humedad.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The check-in starts with an over enthusiastic welcome. A very warm but standard talk, like you get from the stewardess on your flight. A lady serves a welcome drink and a helper already stands by to bring your luggage to your room. A tip is welcomed. But all this is fals chique once you are in your room. Beds are oké, bed linnen is fresh. But it’s like stepping 30 years back in time. Pictures speak for themselves. I need not say more. Maybe some are satisfied with this standard, but thinking of the many hotels and guesthouses nearby, this lodge needs a wake-up call if it wants to survive another say 10 years. The place really has its charm, but it’s more like a youth hostel

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Assez déçu de cette hôtel, qui promettait piscine. Cependant cette dernière est dans un autre hôtel dont on a accès mais il faut se déplacer en voiture car ça reste quand même assez éloigné. Restaurant et petit déjeuner pas fameux, avec peu de choix. Les chambres classiques sont assez petites et mal insonorisées car on entendait les vacanciers du dessus.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Hotel antiguo, con habitaciones que necesitan una reforma/actualización y además, nos pillaron obras justo a la espalda de la habitación que nos asignaron.
A un lado ello, el hotel es supertranquilo y en una ubicación que te permite desconectar a la vez que estar a dos pasos del pueblo.
El desayuno, incluido, es una auténtica delicia.
El servicio de recepción es amabilísimo y os pueden facilitar acudir a la piscina del hotel "Poco a Poco", que pertenece a la misma cadena, de forma grautita.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We really enjoyed our stay. Staff was extremely friendly and helpful.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The hotel has a decor reminiscent of the 80s/90s, but it's carefully maintained, with attentive staff (especially the restaurant workers – they are very attentive). We are surrounded by nature and were able to see several different species of birds and howler monkeys from the hotel. It's nothing too luxurious, but it served our holiday style perfectly!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Good welcome from front desk. Rooms do not have ac.  Asked for a fan and none were available for a 3- night stay. Rooms were the worst!  Loud, thin walls, dated, located directly by the staircase and bar.  Could not sleep. Free breakfast was not good. Fruit was tolerable.  Dinner was tasteless; however lunch was decent.  No swimming pool. Group of 27 high schoolers stayed here - so loud and disruptive. I do not recommend this property.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: En general bien. El desayuno está fenomenal y el servicio muy bueno. En cambio, las habitaciones no están aisladas del ruido (ventanas no cierran bien) y hay muchísima luz de las farolas externas y las cortinas no son opacas, por lo que entra todo por la noche. Las habitaciones también son bastante antiguas.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Déjeuné délicieux, cet endroit est bien juste pour une nuit, s' il ne fait pas beau il n' y a pas assez d' infrastructures par exemple salle de fitness, restauration assez onereuse, si on veut faire laver son linge comptez 30 dollars, chambre propre mais rustique.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: This "hotel" is sold to be a rustic experience, outside the city.| It's crumbling apart.|Showers flood|Bed mattresses are old and springy|Furniture wobbles all over the place.|There's no swimming pool |Cleaning service is slow and sloppy|Avoid

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
El hotel está bien, pero no tiene la piscina en el mismo lugar donde nos alojábamos… además que tiene demasiadas escaleras y el costo del restaurante es muy elevado.

Destaco la simpatía y amabilidad de las chicas de recepción

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Viel besser als erwartet. Die vielen negativen Rezensionen ließen uns schlimmes erwarten. Als viertes Hotel auf unserer Rundreise hat es uns fast die Lust verdorben dort anzureisen. Als wir gegen 12 ankamen, waren unsere Zimmer noch nichts bezugsfertig, ab 14 Uhr sollten sie fertig sein. Eir überbrückten die Wartezeit mit einem kostenlosen Shuttle ins Schwesterhotel, wo eine supernette Pool-Landschaft (überdacht) und eine Poolbar auf uns wartete. Mit Happy Hour von 2-4 pm haben wir den kompletten Nachmittag da verbracht. Gegenüber ist auch noch ein großer Shopping-Komplex, den man ebenfalls noch besuchen kann.
Das Monteverde Country Lodge ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen, aber Frühstück war in Ordnung und die Zimmer zweckmäßig und sauber. Uns fehlte ein Kühlschrank und das Bad roch manchmal etwas nach Abfluss… Ansonsten war es völlig ok 👌🏻

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Lejos del pueblo no en distancia pero si en esfuerzo por las subidas. Dice que tiene piscina pero es en otro hotel que no está cerca.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Uns wurde mit der frech erfundenen Lüge eines technischen Problems im Zimmer das Zimmer gegen unseren Willen gegen ein schlechteres getauscht, damit ein anderer Gast dort einziehen konnte. Reklamation liefen ins Leere, Der zuständige Hotelmanager war nicht erreichbar und die Dame an der Rezeption konnte und wollte uns nicht helfen.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Enkelt rastställe vid motorvägen. Gott kaffe.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Beautiful restaurant! The food was so fresh and flavorful. Coffee was the best I have had. The restaurant has a cute gift shop for souvenirs. The staff speaks English and are very friendly.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Rica repostería

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buena repostería.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Excelente 👌🏽

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: La chuleta demasiado!!!

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: My food came out quickly and the service was fantastic.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Si viajás hacia Guanacaste, ya sea por la Interamericana hasta Liberia, o atravesando el Puente de la Amistad, este lugar es idóneo para estirar piernas, usar los sanitarios; comer algo o hasta por un cafecito nada mas.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Das Essen war von der Preis-Leistung höchstens mittelmäßig. Das Personal war schnell und aufmerksam und das Ambiente fand ich auch eher durchschnittlich. Da habe ich bei meiner Reise durch Costa Rica bereits weitaus besseres Ambiente mit dazugehörigem Essen bekommen.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: El lugar es muy familiar, tiene de todo para niños, desde vasos y platos para que sea más fácil, la comida estuvo bien, el precio también, tal vez un poco elevado, pero pensaría que es lo normal en toda esa zona.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Cannot believe there is no pool as advertised as  promised , extremely disappointed. The pictures on the website extremely misleading
The room I was allocated was in a dark corner & the one I was changed to not much better, it got no sun at all. 😢
The balcony was very small just about able to fit one chair.
My safe was broken and I was unable to access Netflix.. on the TV.
No options to make tea.. just coffee.. 😕
The breakfast area was over crowded and no space
Very disappointing stay .
I wouldn't recommend

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: It’s such a beautiful place to stay. The gardens are lovely and very well kept. The whole place feels calm and peaceful. The hotel food was amazing. The girl at the front desk was very sweet and helped us book tours and call a taxi. We really enjoyed our stay.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We had a very nice experience at this hotel. It’s close enough to town to allow us to walk to several activities in town, and staff were very attentive. Several staff were constantly working to clean the facility. Several areas to relax in beautiful surroundings.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Das Zimmer war ausreichend. Allerdings wurde ich am Morgen durch die Aktivität des Küchenpersonal schon um 5.30 geweckt dann kamen die ersten Gäste so dass man eigentlich selbst aufstehen kann. Das Essen ist o.k. und auch die Zimmer sauber

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Estupendo

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We had a wonderful stay here with our young children. The grounds were beautiful and the staff were so friendly and helpful. The rooms were basic but clean. The town wasn’t walkable with young children but for adults would be fine.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Unser jetziges Zimmer ist ok,  dass zuvor angebotene war ein finsteres, kleines Loch. Es gibt einen schönen Aufenthaltsraum, das Frühstück ist gut.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Das mit Abstand schlechteste Hotel - geht gar nicht! Laut, kleine hellhörige Zimmer ohne Stühle

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: hotel charmant mais chambre petite et bruyante selon l’emplacement.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: In die Jahre gekommen. Kalt. Kein gutes Frühstück. Ich würde hier nicht wieder übernachten

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Excellente surprise !|Nous nous sommes retrouvés par hasard dans cet hôtel restaurant pour deux nuits. |La chambre était certes modeste mais la qualité de l’accueil (Yomar à l’hôtel et Andrea au restaurant) a largement compensé un premier abord mitigé.|Und belle découverte !

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Selbst für Touristen teuer...

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muy lindo hotel con hermosos jardines.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Es un hotel muy lindo con hermosos jardines y decoraciones para recorrer y desconectarse un rato. También tiene juegos para niños.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: De kamers hebben een charmante uitstraling, maar zijn wel aan vernieuwing toe. Helaas zijn ze ook erg gehorig, waardoor geluiden van de buren duidelijk te horen zijn.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Large salads and great coffee

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Super rico no es tan caro y se ven la lapas
Muy bueno

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Passage obligé entre San José et Sámara, c'est la halte idéale pour un Cappuccino et/ou un desayuno typique du Costa Rica ! En prime vous pourrez observer les Haras qui ont eus domicile dans les arbres du parking ! 🤩🌴🙏

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Great stop on our way to Guanacaste coast.
Wonderful Cafe Helados
They also have macaws around. Do not leave you food unattended LOL
There is a small souvenir shop outside in the back.
Nice stuff
And they have some resident sweet kitties there
Thank you for a wonderful bus break

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Très sympa à mi chemin entre San José et Tamarindo

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Delicious food and good service. We stopped here for lunch.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buena atención buen café y bocadillos

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Stopped here while traveling through the area. The parking lot is shared with other businesses so there is someone at the entrance direction traffic for parking spaces.

Menu wasn't huge and kind of limited but we all found something on the menu.

Food was decent. Service was good.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Too much food if you order the pork chop dinner. Recommend you look at the casados which should be smaller (e.g. 1 pork chop).

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Un lugar agradable, con excelente atención y rica comida.  Únicamente que el ambiente dentro del restaurante es sumamente caliente.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Wir haben wegen der dort (angeblich) anzutreffenden Aras eine Kaffeepause eingelegt. Der Cappuccino war gut, das Gebäck ok, die Luft stickig und der vorbeirauschende Verkehr recht laut. Aber Aras haben sich keine Blicken lassen. Stattdessen hielten jede Menge Touristenbusse dort an, denen Leute enrstiegen die - so wie wir auch - mit Kamera in der Hand und Kopf im Nacken suchend herum liefen. Bei der Abfahrt hat uns ein selbsternannter Parkwächter mit Warnweste und großen Gesten aus dem Parkplatz gelotst und sich dafür einen kleinen Obolus auszahlen lassen.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: We enjoyed the food though it took longer than expected to get it, the prices are reasonable.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Excellent bonne cuisine du Costa Rica

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Nicely done traditional food. We stopped by for a light snack and coffee while on a road trip. We had patacones with tasty sauces. The portions were generous. The coffee and batidos are also good and the service was friendly.
There are scarlet macaws near the café, i think they are being fed.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: CLASSIC stop camino a la playa, desayuno tipico 10/10

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: El casado es pequeño  pero bueno

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Долго, дорого, порции маленькие. Останавливаться стоит только чтобы посмотреть попугаев Ара. Сюда привозят много туристов автобусами

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Had the best breakfast in this place. Authentic Costa Rican fare, excellent fruit and excellent customer service.  For lunch, try the "casado".
Also, reasonable prices.
Bonus: they have some macaws/guacamayas in the parking lot for a nice pic opportunity.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: A perfect lunch stop while driving to or from San Jose. Come to see the birds out back, stay for the food.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Es un buen sitio para pasar a desayunar. En mi caso los servicios sanitarios no estaban limpios pero es cuestión de hablar con el personal. La comida donde acuerdo con el precio.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Paramos de pasada en la ruta y tomamos un café. Riquísimo.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: We personally love the Casado, service, and environment and it’s a great place to stop on the way to Samara from SJO. Macaws are a huge plus.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Amplias habitaciones en hotel muy cómodo, sólo le falta una piscina para ser perfecto.
Jennifer de recepción súper amable, pura vida!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Good rooms, we had double and seating sofa. With desk. Good bathroom facilities. Had coffee machine and mini fridge. Parking was just outside our lodge. Good breakfast selection. I heard there is shared swimming pool but we haven’t been advised on check in. Great location to explore nearby towns.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: I spent two nights here last week and thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The hotel was very picturesque; most, if not every room, had a private or shared balcony with chairs or benches; the grounds were colorful and meticulously landscaped, including at least ten small outdoor sitting areas; there was an outdoor children's play area; and all the areas, including my room, were extremely clean. The reception and restaurant staff were friendly, accommodating, and helpful. There were a few restaurants just outside the grounds or within a couple of minutes' walk, although the hotel restaurant offers full service. It took me 10-15 minutes to walk to the center of town. Taxis were readily available for the return trip, if needed, as it is uphill. My room didn't have air conditioning, but at an altitude of about 4,500 feet and a hefty breeze, I actually had to keep the windows closed most of the time. This is a good option for those wanting to stay near town but also feel isolated. I'd definitely stay there again.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Die Country Lodge liegt günstig zum Besuch des Monteverdi Nationalparks. Das Hotel ist sehr einfach ausgestattet. Die Zimmer sind extrem hell höher, so dass man jedes Wort im Nachbarzimmer mithören kann. Die Dusche im Bad hat nicht richtig funktioniert. Das Bett war relativ schmal und die Matratze durch gelegen.|Das Frühstücksbuffet ist durchschnittlich einem drei Sterne Standard entsprechend. Das Abendessen können wir nicht bewerten, da wir auswärts gegessen haben.|Es gibt im Ort sicherlich zahlreiche bessere Hotels.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Really beautiful space and comfortable stay after a rough few nights at my last accommodation in La Fortuna. Staff is amazing and friendly. Corresponded thru WhatsApp to book tours and transport which was efficient. Even any questions or concerns you could ask thru WhatsApp. Breakfast was delicious. Clean and comfortable beds and bathrooms. A lot of places to sit and lounge outside to rest an enjoy the fresh air.

Only con with this for me as a solo traveler without a car is that it is far away from the center of town. Walking is up and down hills and public transport/cabs aren’t existent. So I was somewhat limited to restaurants and shops only nearby which were few and far between.

Would be great for families or those with a car to drive into town for more food and shopping options.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Posizione comoda x vistare il parco, personale alla reception gentile, disponibile e propositivo.
La struttura ha bisogno di manutenzione perché ormai datata, ma molto carina.
Camere piccole, fredde con spifferi importanti dalle finestre e dalla porta di ingresso. Non c’è acqua calda nelle camere, solo molto tiepida tendendo al freddo.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
A nice clean hotel. Has a good Breakfast buffet and a nice patio for a drink. Happy hour too!
Close to the butterfly garden.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We had a great stay at the MV Country Lodge. Breakfast is incredible. Staff was friendly and attentive. We left an item behind in the hotel room and we are on bicycle. However, the hotel arranged to send the items with a shuttle bus to La Fortuna. Definitely recommend this place!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Lodge in posizione tranquilla e comoda pre le varie escursioni.
Camere un po' piccole.
Ottima la colazione.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Nous sommes arrivés en groupe, un peu tard, et repartis très tôt le lendemain.
Mais la chambre, pour le prix, est vraiment très efficace: 2 lits plutôt confortables, une salle de bain très pratique avec du rangement, et une accessibilité au restaurant très aisée.
La chambre est bien équipée, et c’est propre!
Nous avons dormi comme des bébés.
Nous y retournerions avec plaisir.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: die Superior Zimmer sind ok, doch bei 18 Grad Aussentemperatur war es drinnen ohne Heizung sehr kühl. Das Hotel liegt oben auf einem Hügel und zu Fuss muss man mit 45 Min. bis ins Zentrum rechnen.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The rooms were a little loud in the poring rain but otherwise very comfortable and good service. Lots of good restaurants nearby within walking distance.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Nice hotel. Good breakfast. Beds are good. Pillows menu, safe, soap, shampoo, hair conditioner are of a decent quality. There's no smart tv in the room, no working desk and chars. For me it was ok, as I did not stay here long. There's also a beautiful game room. We enjoyed it!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Pas très satisfait de cet établissement...
Pour commencer il faut un 4x4 pour accéder à l'hôtel, le chemin est complètement défoncé 🚙
À notre arrivée on nous dit que la chambre 76 sera prête. Lorsque nous revenons pour le check-in, la dame se met à rire et nous dit que c'est finalement la chambre 75...🤣🤦‍♂️
C'est une région où il fait frais, donc n'ayez pas peur d'avoir des courants d'air dans votre appartement 🌬️ à cause des fenêtres et portes qui ne ferme pas 🚪🪟( voir le jour au niveau de la porte d'entrée)
Si possible réserver une chambre à l'étage, car le plancher est en bois et nous avons entendu les voisins du dessus marcher, aller aux wc, prendre leur douche,etc...👂
Je signale que la télé ne marche pas, personne ne vient.📺
Le buffet est assez complet, sauf si comme nous vous tombez avec des touristes asiatiques qui ont TOUT DÉVORÉS 🈺🉑... Et emmène avec eux les fruits, remplissent leur gourde de café, etc...du coup il ne restait pas grand chose. Il faudrait que le personnel se mette en colère contre ça.
Sinon dans les points positifs, cocktail de bienvenue très bon 🍸et établissement très propre dans l'ensemble.
⚠️ Dernier point important, il n'y a pas de piscine contrairement aux photos de Google ⚠️
Bref nous sommes partis 1 jour + tôt

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Tired looking hotel with rooms feeling damp and in  need of a bit of TLC. Rooms have paper thin walls so it's noisy with doors being slammed and talking/TV in adjacent rooms. Could hear neighbours showering and hair drying very clearly. Hot water was in short supply for a decent shower and the water pipes/system are very noisy. It rained and was extremely windy while we were there and we were woken at night by things hitting the tin roof.

Lovely staff. Food and drink expensive but ok quality.

I wouldn't stay again.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Easy parking. We bought tickets on site. That area was beautiful and close to town. A waterfall was beautiful. Stairs were a killer though. There were places to stop and rest on your way back up if you did them. The water was cool but refreshing.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Hermoso lugar. Pero como todo lugar turístico, la gente está más preocupada por sacarse 275 fotos que por disfrutar el lugar

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Una excursion con unas cuantas escaleras, pero todo bien organizado. La catarata es espectacular, te puedes bañar, hay para canviarse en la entrada. La verdad que fue una bonita experiencia

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Hermoso lugar! Tiene dos spots para bañarse. Uno donde está la catarata y la verdad solo recomiendo para personas que saben nadar y adultos. El otro spot para personas que solo quieren relajarse, no saben nadar o andan con niños. El agua es de un color claro verde azul precioso. El sendero está en excelente estado. Son bastantes gradas que al subir puede que algunas personas les cueste pero tiene varios puntos de descanso. Cuenta con bar y restaurante. Los precios del bar son caros como es normal de La Fortuna. Los precios de la entrada a las cataratas los veo normales.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
It's a beautiful waterfall without question, but it's just one. There are around 500 steps leading to a small area with minimal seating. What seats there are are occupied by staff busy on their phones. So many staff doing nothing. It was pretty shocking.

You can swim but the route to the water is pretty dangerous and could easily be made a little safer.

It's a highly commercialised, busy attraction and definitely not worth the very high entry fee.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: De las joyas más hermosas de Costa Rica 💚 instalaciones perfectas y cómodas.  Aunque hay muchas gente, vale la pena contemplar esta maravilla iconica de La Fortuna.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
מסלול יפה נחמד וקצר למפל, המים קרים מדי לטעמי
שעתיים מספיקות לטיול

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Lugar hermoso que vale la pena conocer, lleva ropa para baño.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
Go early! We went at 8am and only a few people were there. Within 30 minutes it was getting busy with tours.

Plenty places to put your belongings on the rocks away from the water. I would highly recommend water shoes, it is very slippy!

Some people just looked at the waterfall and went straight back up but in my opinion that's a shame. It's worthwhile taking a dip and getting  some great photos.

Plenty of space to get dry and put your shoes on before heading back up.

Don't let the steps put you off. I was concerned about climbing back up but with a few breaks along the way it is very manageable.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Great experience. The stairs can be a lot, but there are plenty of places to sit and take a break.Entry fee was $20usd

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy bello lugar y comida deliciosa el ambiente muy tranquilo y la tienda muy surtida para comprar detalle.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Excelente comida

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: This is the worst place. I don't recommend this establishment. I saw a lot of flies on food.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Esta fue la peor experiencia en esta cafetería. Lo primero que me llamó la atención fue la tierra, las cucarachas y las moscas posadas sobre la comida. El servicio fue terrible. La mujer que tomó el pedido no fue amigable, fue grosera. Su atención estaba dispersa, preguntaba constantemente sobre el pedido. Parecía que estaba borracha. No recomendaría este café, ya que puedes sufrir una intoxicación alimentaria.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Me and my husband were always visiting this place on our way.
On the 1st of January we stopped there to enjoy our fresh drink. Unfortunately, this day a woman who was taking orders wasn't nice at all she wanted to be "a BIG BOSS"! She didn't say hello, is it difficult to be nice to clients?
There were too many people so we were waiting to our order where it was  possible to stay.
That serving woman brought our fresh drinks and put them on the opposite side of the bar counter like 4 m away. We reminded her that we are waiting from the other side closer to her so it's easier to her to give us our drinks right here. But she said that we must walk all the way to take our drinks!😡 Very, very terrible behavior and an attitude to clients!😱
Also, we wanted to buy some pieces of cake, but we saw flies sitting on pastries and, of coz, we refused! That was disgusting!🤢
We don't recommend this place any more!

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Nous avons pris des tacos, la nourriture n'est pas incroyable mais le personnel est très sympathique et avons eu la chance d'observers des aras de différentes couleurs.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: No es la gran cosa de restaurante y un poco cara la comida la atención bastante regular.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: El mejor desayuno

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Consumí en el local y la porción + sabor increíble. ☺️

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Harán agradable tu visita.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Siempre que me detengo en este restaurante me deleito con un buen café y alguna sabrosa repostería. Atención muy buena y de calidad.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Excelente hotel

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Excelente opción en monteverde el personal es muy amable y las habitaciones son cómodas y un buen desayuno y restaurante

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Un lugar muy agradable, incluye desayuno buffet y es muy rico.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Nos sorprendió por completo el lugar, desde que llegamos nos recibieron de una muy buena manera, la calidez humana es increíble, las habitaciones son acogedoras con ese toque rústico de montaña, El Restaurante es una excelente opción para no salir del lugar, cenamos allí, la comida espectacular y el desayuno del siguiente día fue muy muy completo! Volveremos sin duda!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muy lindo y limpio el hotel en general, muy buena ubicación. La atención de su personal es muy acogedora por Melissa, María José y Joselyn; así como de don Rafael; te brindan apoyo en las solicitudes que se les realizan; un lugar para tela mojarse y pasarla muy bien

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Stayed for 2 nights here and it was very rainy!
Breakfast was good and fresh and I enjoyed the hot selection with some different choices both mornings.
Staff were very friendly. People have said drinks were expensive but I think with the happy hour it made it cheaper than other places in town and across costa rica. Think it is just expensive in the hotel resorts.
Dinner was pretty good - we shared a beef pizza one night which was plenty and although it was a wrap base rather than standard pizza it was really tasty!
Staff were very friendly and helpful.
It is walkable to and from town, even in the pouring rain, but it is a bit of a steep climb back which is all part of the fun but perhaps not for those with poor levels of fitness or not used to walking

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: El hotel está Apartadó, necesitas taxi para todo. Las habitaciones y el cuarto de baño necesitan limpieza a fondo. Hace tiempo que no lo limpian bien, lo hacen de una pasadita rápida y se nota mucho. Los desayunos no destacan en nada, lo mismo en todos los hoteles y no muy abundante. En nada se colapsa el comedor. Estuve hace dos semanas, había un grupo de estudiantes que hacían mucho ruido en la zona de los pasillos y nadie del personal del hotel, les llamó la atención. No volvería a hospedarme en éste hotel, ni lo recomiendo a nadie

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Cute place, the dinner wait staff were rude and the beds are so uncomfortable I would rather had slept on the floor.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Chambre spacieuse et confortable.
Nous y avons eu un accueil agréable, citronnade à l'arrivée, personnel pour accompagner et porter les bagages à la chambre, le tout avec le sourire.
Le buffet du petit déjeuner est correct.
Le lieu est calme et paisible.
Une bonne adresse.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The beds were infested with ants and strangers hair, as well as the toilet paper. The shower water was ice cold and the food was disgusting. The drinks were absurdly priced. Absolutely would not recommend.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Very clean,well cared for resort.Kevin at reception was the most helpful with directions,suggestions and tour reservations.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Wonderful place to visit if you’re going to Monteverde.  From the time we arrived, the receptionist, Jennifer Cruz, was very warm and accommodating.  From local recommendations, to making reservations for us, to offering umbrellas, etc she could not have been more gracious.  We would not hesitate to come back.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: La experiencia es 100% recomendable. El hotel no está mal ubicado, como a 200 m hay restaurantes y supermercado y hay un mariposario cerca. Los empleados ambles y serviciales. Jennifer la chica de la recepción es maravillosa y solo con verla apetece sonreir

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel recomendable. La atención en recepción ha sido inmejorable. Es mejor tener coche, pues está apartado del centro del pueblo, muy en la tónica de Monteverde, donde las distancias son largas, las ubicaciones estan apartadas, y el terreno es difícil.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Personal muy atento que nos ofreció un cambio de habitacion para poder mejorar nuestra experiencia.|El hotel adentrado en la naturaleza permitió disfrutar grata experiencia.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Het hotel ligt buiten het centrum.  Om naar het centrum te gaan is vervoer wel erg handig. Gaat er redelijk stijl omhoog. Ontvangst was correct maar we wachten nu nog steeds op iemand die ons naar de jamer zou brengen.  Dus zelf naar gedaan. Kamer was erg standaard en relatief klein. Ruimte om natte kleding een geertje uit te hangen is er niet. Verder stonk het bij ons naar de schoonmaak middelen. Alsof er een fles chloor door de kamer was gespoten. Hiervoor zouden ze beter een bloemetjes lucht kunnen gebruiken. Zou je ook geter slapen . Ontbijt vond ik niet super. Pancakes waren taai maar de roerei was wel lekker. Vonden het vruchtensappen net suikerwater zo zoet. Is echt wel ruimte boor verbetering.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buen lugar para pasar a comer cuando se viaja a Guanacaste. El café es exquisito.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: We did a Costa Rican food class experience. Picked our veggies and fruit right off the tree. We learned how to make tortillas, potacones, and lots of other food. Awesome class.  Yet another Tico experience!!! We highly recommend it.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Buen servicio y buena comida. Buena parada para degustar comida local.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
No como carne y el mesero no nos dijo que tenía carne. Luego de decirle al mesero, él insistió insistió que nos dijo cuando mi pareja y yo no escuchamos nada. En general muy mal servicio y los menús no dicen qué ingredientes trae la comida.
No lo recomiendo ni por el sabor ni por la atención al cliente

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Pedí un casado Guanacaste que en lugar de arroz y frijoles trae gallo pinto, el plato está muy bien de sabor de presentación, sin embargo trae el punto una proteína, una tortilla palmeada plátano maduro y la ensalada de repollo, si a eso le agregan al menos un ingrediente más yo puedo decir que es un casado muy bueno que se respeta, pero en este caso es un casado ok.
Soy un poco crítico, pero es retroalimentación, eso es todo
De tomar pedí un batido de papaya  en agua, y ese estuvo muy bien, buen tamaño sabor con bastante papaya.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Hier een heerlijke Banano Chocolate shake gedronken. In de buurt zitten ara's in de bomen. Een leuk plekje om onderweg even te stoppen.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Excelente lugar, pasamos almorzar y nos encantó la pasta y el arroz con camarones.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Die Anlage ist insgesamt sehr schön und gepflegt. Die Zimmer sind in Ordnung, wirken jedoch etwas dunkel, was den Komfort etwas schmälert.
Das Badezimmer hingegen überzeugt, modern eingerichtet mit einer großen, angenehmen Dusche. Auch der Service war gut, sehr freundlich und zuverlässig.
Das Frühstück war in Ordnung und bot eine solide Auswahl, ohne besondere Highlights.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Hotel sin ascensor , tuvimos que subir y bajar nosotros las maletas. No tiene piscina y en su página web hay una foto de una piscina.
Habitaciones grandes pero los colchones son pésimos , están rotos y son incómodos.
Para ir al centro del pueblo tienes que ir caminando 20 minutos con pendientes de subidas y bajadas.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Se trata de un hotel en la loma de una montaña por lo que las vistas son preciosas. Cuenta con zona protegida de parque natural y te ofrecen paseos y caminatas por senderos tanto con guías como por cuenta propia, así como actividades de tirolinas super recomendables. Cuenta con piscina, gimnasio, restaurante. Para facilitar la movilidad dentro del hotel se cuenta con un servicio de transporte interno llamando a recepción. El restaurante también merece la pena y la zona de terraza tiene bonitas vistas. Las habitaciones son amplias

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Las habitaciones son espaciosas, acogedoras y tienen muy buen servicio al cliente.
El restaurante tiene muy pocos platillos, pero la calidad es buena.
El desayuno buffet es buenísimo!
Tiene lindos jardines donde los niños pueden jugar o uno se puede relajar.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel tranquilo tipo de montaña. Buen servicio de recepción. Restaurante y bar demasiados caros. Precios neoyorquinos. Ubicado en una zona tranquila  pero con restaurantes muy cerca

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Gedateerd hotel met zeer gehorige kamers en karig ontbijt.Het bed is keihard. Personeel in het restaurant en bij de receptie is wel erg aardig en behulpzaam. Aan hen ligt het niet dat wij dit hotel afraden

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Country Lodge is a beautiful hotel. Spacious rooms, friendly staff, good WiFi and a decent restaurant (but expensive, happy hour means 2 beers for $8). The breakfast was good and varied from day to day. The shower wasn't that good, the water wasn't always warm. The staff is friendly and arranges everything you need (even though it can be expensive).
It was walkable to the center of Santa Elena, but back it's nicer to take a taxi because it's uphil quite steep.
A big downside to this hotel is the 'swimming pool' they claim to offer at the hotel nextdoor. Apparently the swimming pool is at another hotel which you would have to take a taxi to. Beforehand you have to reserve it too, because they don't have that much space... So promoting a swimming pool seems like a scam. It's better if they don't promote it as such.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel sin más.Nos tocó una habitación sin reformar antigua y pequeña.|Bien en la recepción, pero tampoco busques lujos y confort lo justo.Sin piscina. Algo aburrido y un restaurante bastante regular y encima nada económico.Desayuno bastante pobre.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Mooi hotel, schoon, netjes.
Vriendelijke personeel
Goed ontbijt.
Diner ook echt heerlijk gegeten!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel rural, limpieza aceptable aunque el colchón estaba lleno de moho. Atención de recepción exquisita. Cuidado que si va todo el hotel a la misma hora a desayunar se colapsa y se puede tardar más de lo habitual. Desayuno aceptable. No tiene piscina pero te dejan acceder a un hotel de la misma compañía que está a 15 min caminando, lo que para volver hay que subir una cuesta. Los taxis te cobran 2000-3000 colones por viaje y te los facilita el propio hotel, una buena opción es bajar caminando y subir en taxi. El otro hotel, Poco a poco está muy bien, categoría superior con piscina climatizada y jacuzzi.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Reception fantastica da 10 stelle! Ti introducono nella zona proponendo attività e ristoranti della loro catena anche con navetta inclusa xè il lodge è in una posizione non comoda x uscire a piedi!!! Le stanze sono semplici e decorose, pulizia al TOP. Colazione a buffet semplice con il classico. Ristorante con Happy hour e cucina buonissima. Una scelta da valutare che cmq non delude grazie al servizio eccellente!!! Bravi

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muy bien el hotel, el restaurante excelente

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Wat een afgebrand dorp. Waanzinnig gedateerd, ontzettend gehorig. Je kan de buurman horen snurken. Restaurant denkt dat het een sterren restaurant heeft qua prijzen. Wel vriendelijk personeel. Ver weg van het dorp en geen zwembad.||Als je kan kiezen en je gaat voor rust in de nacht…… niet dit hotel

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy buena 👌 la comida en un ambiente relajante los maduros excelentes 👌 👍🏻

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy rica la comida

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Excelente restaurante, la comida riquísima y la atención muy especial

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Gewoon goede bediening en lekker eten. Er vliegen in de tuin vlakbij ara's rond. Het is vlakbij de snelweg.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Loved the place, food and service were good

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Parada obligatoria: buen parqueo, con avistamiento de lapas, lugar lleno de árboles muy hermoso, desayuno Guanacasteco de lo mejor. Quizás no es barato pero definitivamente lo vale.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Just stopped for coffee, which was good.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text:
Pasé por un desayuno familiar, desde la entrada el ambiente es precioso, lejos de la ciudad, lejos de la chusma, se come rico.
Hay que ver el espacio exterior 👌

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Very good traditional style food with very large portions.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Lugar perfecto para ir a desayunar y estirar las piernas cuando uno va hacia Liberia. La comida riquísima y la atención excelente.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Belle cascade très accessible, les marches se font très bien.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Très touristique, $$$

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Ein atemberaubender Wasserfall. Am Rand des Bereiches kann man sich erfrischen und weiter unten auch. Die 500 Treppen sind kein Problem und mit ein bisschen Glück sieht man auch einen Tucan😀.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: This is a beautiful place to visit.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: 20 Dollar inkom. Naar mijn mening een dure toegangsprijs om een waterval te bekijken.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Una buena caminata de 500 escalones con vistas de la cascada desde varios puntos y la impresionante fuerza de la naturaleza para terminar nadando agradable en el río

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: What a beautiful waterfall, it seriously takes your breath away (literally and figuratively, those stairs are no joke but they are worth it)

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Amazing. Worth the 517 steps to the river and back. So refreshing

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Lugar belíssimo como era de se experar. Escada bem demarcada. Segura.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: La Fortuna Waterfall is astounding - not Nicaragua, Victoria or Iguassu Falls, but a pure example of a single plunging cataract! The walkway is beautifully curated, safe, and sign posted, with clear guidance from staff of what to expect... It IS 530 steps down, but take it slow and you'll be fine. Plenty of rest benches on the way up.

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Great looking restaurant, clean and woodish style. Food was good too!

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Nos fascina desayunar aqui, excelente atención, servicio y comida...hermosas LAPAS.... una parada que no puede faltar ...en un hermosolugar y ...un café delicioso

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Outstanding Service!

title: Restaurante Mi Finca
text: Muy bonito el lugar por su remodelación. La comida muy buena.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Maravillosa experiencia en un hotel muy bien cuidado, en el que te sientes como en casa. El personal muy amable y atento. Queremos destacar la atención del personal de recepción y, en especial, de Maria José, que nos ayudó mucho al llegar, sobretodo en la reserva de tours. También destacamos la buena atención y amabilidad del personal del restaurante, en especial de Allison, Andrea y Francisco. Por cierto, en el restaurante se desayuna, come y cena muy bien. También cabe destacar el cuidado de los jardines que rodean las habitaciones. Hotel muy recomendable.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The hotel is perched on a hill, but unfortunately there is no view down the valley.|Looking at the website, the hotel has had few improvements such as the reception or the headboard in our room or the new sofa. It looks more contemporary.|The hotel is good as a base, but the facilities are limited. One restaurant/bar and that is it. The sister hotel downtown has a swimming pool and transport is offered to go there.|We found our bedroom spacious and well appointed. As mentioned in other comments, there is no A/C, but that was not needed anyway. Nights can be fresh. The bathroom was small with a big shower, which is standard in Costa Rica. But unlike other places, there was ample space to put our wash bags, either under the basin or on the self above the toilet. The only issue was the bathroom door (recurrent issue in CR) which opens inside the small bathroom. It is therefore difficult to be 2 in the bathroom.|We had a problem with the safe, which locked itself. Unable to repair it, a new one was fitted immediately by a very friendly maintenance man.|Food at the restaurant was good and breakfast very good. |We noticed that the walls were thin, but that was not a problem, as everyone goes to bed early and gets up early. This is not a party place. So there were no noisy people.|The staff is wonderful. We were warmly welcome by the staff at reception. They could not do enough. We had to wait for our room, and I can see another comment complaining about the wait. But the main problem is our transfer people picking us up too early and offloading us too early, too. 2pm check in is standard everywhere. However, we were dropped off in all places in between 11.30 and 12.30 hence the wait afterwards.|The restaurant staff was equally friendly and helpful.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Helt nydelig hotell i vakre omgivelser. Fine og rene rom. Frokostbuffeten var god. Hotellet ligger ca 20 minutter gange fra Santa Elena, så det er ikke en alt for lang tur. Noe som trekker ned er at det er veldig lytt ut til gangen og imellom rommene. Man kan tydelig høre samtaler som de på naborommet har. OBS! Hvis du sover lett så ha med deg ørepropper.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: La habitación era muy limpia y con todas las comodidades, todos los colaboradores del hotel super amables, ibamos en un paseo de moto y el señor (no se si era de mantenimiento?) incluso nos prestó una hidrolavadora para quitar el barro. Excelente servicio.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
10 de 10 bastante ameno, muy lindas instalaciones y personal muy atento.

Apenas para un fin de semana de paz

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Excelente lugar, privado, acogedor, buen espacio de parqueo, todas las comodidades, recomendado

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: El entorno y los exteriores del hotel son muy bonitos. Las habitaciones son sencillas y creo que necesitarían alguna reforma, por eso les doy 4 estrellas. Un poco retirado del centro de Santa Elena, aunque se puede tomar un taxi si se quiere ir al pueblo o volver de él (la vuelta es cuesta arriba). El personal del hotel es lo mejor, sobre todo el de recepción. Todas las personas que estaban ya el mostrador han sido extremadamente amables.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Habitaciones estándar pensé q era mas rodeado de naturaleza, teníamos otra expectativa pero cumple funcion es como para dormir y hacer actividades afuera. Si buscan algo más romántico no es el lugar
El desayuno variado y de buen sabor

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hôtel très sympa, situé pas loin des parcs, personnel sympathique.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
מלון לודג' כפרי ונעים לשהות. מטופח מאוד ומרבית(אם לא כל) החדרים מרוצפים בעץ מהגוני, דבר המוסיף ליוקרה של המקום.
