מומל

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Super service a la réception et au restaurant. Jennifer a été de très bon conseil pour le choix de nos activités et tout le personnel était très sympa et serviable.
Les chambres sont spacieuses avec une petite terrasse, petit bémol pour la literie qui était assez dure par rapport aux autres hôtels qu'on a visité. L’hotel se situe a proximité du centre et de toutes les activités possibles a monteverde, il y a des navettes pour aller a certaines activités sur option.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We very much enjoyed our stay. The staff were all friendly and welcoming and the hotel was nicely decorated and clean. Our room was spacious with two double and comfortable beds and a spacious bathroom with a good sized shower area. The room was clean and comfortable with a TV, safe and a floor standing rotating fan, which was more than effective in providing cool air if required. We had a great balcony with a table and chair with a view over the garden. The hotel is a 30 minute walk, or short car journey away from the nearest town and we found it nice and quiet. The breakfast was a buffet with cereal, toast and fruit options. There is a restaurant which provides a good menu but we found it a bit expensive so we went to a restaurant that is next to the hotel which was very good and had a menu at a reasonable price.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muy lindo hotel y con un buen servicio

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Pues la verdad estaba un poco preocupada por las reseñas tan diferentes que había visto, pero el hotel me ha sorprendido para bien. La habitación es espaciosa y está en un  jardín muy cuidado, con cartelitos con los nombres de las plantas y unas fuentes que contribuyen a crear un ambiente tranquilo y agradable. Todo el personal muy atento. La única pega, el bufet del desayuno que es justito; por lo demás hemos estado muy bien aquí estas dos noches.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Instalaciones modestas, sin aire acondicionado. Desayuno bueno. Restaurant con una oferta de menú acotada pero de buena calidad y variedad.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Visitamos el parque con Sukia Travel ya que no se puede ir sin un guía. El agente de turismo es quien se encarga también de sacar la entrada al parque que son limitadas. Por lo que es altamente recomendable sacar con bastante antelación.

El parque cuenta con unas excelentes instalaciones, como baños comedor y cafetería. También cuentan con estaciones para cargar agua potable.

Si bien depende de la naturaleza, nosotros tuvimos la suerte de ver muchos animales.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Einzigartiger Nationalpark mit grossem Tierreichtum. Dank eines erfahrenen Guide konnten wir sowohl einen Tapir als auch einen Puma im Unterholz beobachten. Ein traumhaftes Erlebnis - damit hätten wir in keiner Weise gerechnet.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Ich weiß nicht ob wir Pech hatten,  aber an Tieren haben wir Nasenbär, Spinne und 1 Krokodil gesehen.  Nichts von Artenreichtum. Man wird auf dem kurzen Touristen-Laufsteg parallel zur Küste geführt, alle paar Meter andere Gruppen . Da würde ich als Tier auch abhauen.
Hatte mir mehr erhofft. Schade
Kein Tukan, Ara, Puma oder sonstiges.  Der Wald selbst ist toll,  aber das gibt es überall im Land, auch kostenlos.
Scheinbar einen schlechten Tag erwischt für viel Geld.  Zumindest wenn man die Fotos hier alle sieht.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
El Parque Nacional Corcovado es simplemente impresionante. Es uno de los lugares con mayor biodiversidad del país y del mundo. La experiencia de caminar por sus senderos, rodeado de selva, ríos y vida silvestre, es única.
Ideal para quienes aman la naturaleza en su estado más puro. Un destino que definitivamente hay que visitar al menos una vez en la vida.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
We visited Corcovado National Park with Sukia Travel, and while it is not cheap, it truly is a once-in-a-lifetime experience. You have to be on the beach very early in the morning (around 5 a.m.), from where you are taken by boat to the park. The scenery is breathtaking — and in our case, the experience was made even more intense with huge waves along the way.

Upon arrival, registration is required, and we really appreciated how strict the rules are regarding nature protection. No plastic water bottles or outside food are allowed, which shows how seriously conservation is taken here. After a short orientation, we started the first hike. There are several trails, and the walks take place around the station.

The accommodation is like a large jungle camp: a big wooden building with canopy-style bunk beds, shared showers and toilets, and a communal dining area. Shoes are not allowed inside — everything is wooden. There’s a veranda with chairs where you can relax and simply take in the surroundings.

Each guided hike lasts about three hours in the forest. The package included one night of accommodation and four meals. Meals are served cafeteria-style — simple but tasty food such as salads, vegetables, eggs, rice, meat, and fruit. Alcohol and cigarettes are strictly forbidden.

Our guide was outstanding — deeply knowledgeable, clearly knowing the forest inside and out, moving through it as if he were breathing together with it. Thanks to him, we saw an incredible amount of wildlife: capuchin, squirrel, spider, and howler monkeys; agoutis; coatis; crocodiles; caimans; parrots; countless local birds; as well as tapirs, sloths, and anteaters. Beyond the animals, the rainforest itself and the wild ocean coastline are absolutely stunning.

On the last day, we also went to a river in the forest for a swim. The water was crystal clear, and swimming there was an absolutely beautiful, refreshing experience.

Electricity is turned off at 8 p.m., but we stayed on the veranda for hours afterward, watching the night forest, the glow of fireflies, and listening to the sound of the ocean.

What is especially remarkable is the dedication of the local people to environmental protection. In 1975, this area had been heavily deforested, but it was restored by locals — an extraordinary example of commitment to nature.

An intense, humbling, and unforgettable experience. Highly recommended for anyone who truly wants to understand what pristine rainforest means.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Słabiutkie to miejsce nad wyraz, oferujące młody las o bardzo niewielkiej różnorodności flory i fauny, paskudne plaże i bardzo nieciekawe wybrzeże. Może na warunki kostarykańskie jest to jakieś aj-waj, ale niestety wymięka, jeśli widziało się choć trochę świata. Nie może konkurować z gigantami typu Amazonia, Borneo, Serengeti czy Galapagos, co jest oczywiste, ale jednym palcem pokona go pierwszy z brzegu park narodowy np. w Malezji czy Argentynie. Szkoda czasu na jego zwiedzanie, chyba że akurat ma się go w nadmiarze. Rozczarowanie jednak gwarantowane, jeśli ma się choćby blade porównanie z innymi tego typu miejscami na świecie.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Hermoso lugar

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Eigentlich einer der schönsten Nationalparks, nur nicht bei Regenwetter. Fast keine Tiersichtungen.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Un lugar lleno de naturaleza, senderos al natural , playas hermosas , vista de animles en su habitad natural

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
An Unforgettable Adventure in the Wild Heart of Costa Rica

If you’re planning a trip to Costa Rica, Corcovado National Park is an absolute must. Yes, it’s remote and takes time to get there including a boat ride that feels straight out of Jurassic Park but that’s all part of the adventure. The park’s isolation is exactly what makes it so special.

We did a one-day tour with a guide (which you’ll need to reserve in advance), and it was incredible. The biodiversity here is like nothing else we experienced —monkeys, Coatis, tapirs, scarlet macaws, and more, all in their natural habitat. It’s wild, untouched, and full of life.

Our guide was fantastic: knowledgeable, passionate, and able to spot wildlife we would’ve completely missed on our own.

Corcovado isn’t just a visit; it’s an experience. Highly recommend it if you’re looking to connect with nature in one of the most pristine places on Earth

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Increíble

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Der Nationalpark ist nicht ganz leicht zu erreichen – mit dem Schnellboot geht es 1,5 Stunden weit hinaus und anschließend weiter an der Küste entlang. Schon die Fahrt dorthin ist ein Erlebnis für sich.

Vor Ort war ich überwältigt von der Artenvielfalt. Der Nationalpark ist kaum touristisch erschlossen: keine ausgebauten Wege, alles naturbelassen und wunderschön. Man muss gut aufpassen, wo man hintritt – große Spinnen und noch größere Schlangen kreuzten meinen Weg. Fledermäuse, Faultiere, Affen, Tapire, Krokodile und viele weitere Tiere konnte ich aus einer Nähe beobachten, wie ich sie nie zuvor erlebt habe. Es fühlte sich teilweise wie ein Traum an.

Mein persönliches Highlight war der Nasenbär. Ihn bekommt man dort nicht allzu häufig zu sehen – ich hatte Glück. Das war einer der schönsten und eindrucksvollsten Ausflüge, die ich je gemacht habe. Der Aufwand, der Weg, die Zeit und die Kosten haben sich absolut gelohnt.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Ein absolut beeindruckendes Naturerlebnis! Der Corcovado-Nationalpark ist ein echtes Paradies für Naturliebhaber. Die Artenvielfalt ist atemberaubend – wir haben Tapire, Affen und viele bunte Vögel gesehen. Die Wanderungen durch den dichten Regenwald sind abenteuerlich, aber lohnenswert. Alles wirkt unberührt und wild, als wäre man in eine andere Welt eingetaucht.

Ein kleiner Wermutstropfen: Am Shop vor Ort muss man für Getränke wie Kaffee und Snacks extra zahlen – nur Wasser ist inklusive. Bei dem hohen Preis der Tour hätten wir gehofft, dass zumindest eine freie Bedienung an Heißgetränken mit dabei ist.

Trotzdem: fünf Sterne für ein unvergessliches Erlebnis!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: This place is disgusting. We arrived to rooms that were infested with insects, centipedes and other unidentifiable species. Our room smelled heavily of mold/ mildew. It was clear that the ceiling had mold and was painted over at some point. Smelled of chemical and bleach. It was extremely hot, no AC only a portable fan. Extremely noisy loud environment in which I had to call the front 4 times to assist with the situation.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Un hotel de muy buena calidad y excelente servicio

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: No me gustó el hotel, nos dieron la habitación a las 14:00 pm cuando llegamos a las 11:00 am.|Nos dieron una habitación a pie de paso que se oía todo y se veía todo, les pedimos que nos las cambiaran y lo hicieron, nos dieron una más tranquila pero muy pequeña, bastante incómoda.|Eso sí, el personal del hotel fue amable pero no lo recomiendo en base a mi experiencia

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Where do I begin? I’ve travelled the world, slept in five-star suites and $5 beach huts, but nothing prepared me for this. I’m fairly certain I time-travelled back to the 1960s the moment I stepped inside this crumbling relic of a “hotel.” Except in the 60s, I imagine they at least changed the sheets. Here? Not so much. Ours were as fresh as a compost bin, complete with mystery stains and the faint aroma of regret.||||The toilet looked like it had survived three wars. It groaned louder than I did when I realised how much I’d paid for this experience. And speaking of paying, I’ve seen better facilities offered to illegal immigrants for free. I’ve paid for this dystopian hospitality experiment.||||Let’s talk wildlife: bugs everywhere. I’m talking the kind of insect party you’d expect in a David Attenborough documentary. It wasn’t just a room; it was an ecosystem. I half expected to be charged for the privilege of sleeping in a nature reserve. I wouldn’t let my dog sleep here!||||Breakfast? Oh yes, if you enjoy hunting for a clean plate and a free table like it’s a competitive sport, you’re in for a treat. There weren’t enough tables unless you enjoy playing musical chairs with other grumpy, sleep-deprived guests. I watched someone wipe a table with what I think was a sock. Or maybe it was a napkin. Hard to tell.||||Let’s widen this review and look at Costa Rica itself…Hugely overrated. It’s like they heard the phrase “Pura Vida” and decided to charge a premium for it. Want to see a waterfall that wouldn’t even qualify as a decent fountain in Europe? That’ll be $25 per person. Dual pricing is a thing here, locals pay less, tourists get rinsed. It’s not even subtle.||||And just when you thought you could escape the disappointment with some TV, everything’s dubbed in Spanish. Even the American channels. So unless you’re fluent or enjoy miming plotlines, good luck winding down at the end of your day. ||||This wasn’t a holiday. This was a slow-motion robbery of my time, money, and will to live. If annual leave had a refund policy, I’d be filing paperwork now.||||Avoid like the plague, unless the plague is also staying here. In that case, they may already be fully booked.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Estuvimos dos noches y nos trataron de lujo. El estació és muy confortable y se queden observar colibris en sis jardines, que tornen muy cuidado.
Para acceder al pueblo és importante disponer de vehiculo pròpia, que puedes aparcar dentro el complejo y cerca de tu habitacion. El espacio exterior de cada habitacion és estupendo.
Nosaltres estuvimos genial.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Buen descanso, las camas confortables. Personal muy amable. Pilla a desmano del pueblo, aunque no supone un gran problema. Permite entrada al spa del hotel Poco a Poco, recomendable visitarlo.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: This cute country lodge was exactly as advertised. Loved having the bar and restaurant right there and the staff was so friendly. Yes the room does not have AC which it says when booking it so that was not a surprise but at night it was surprisingly cool in the room. Would stay here again for sure!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hübsch und bequem, aber seeeehr einsam gelegen. Tolle Möglichkeiten zum Zeitvertreib, zB Red Pool 👍

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: La paredes son de papel, se escucha todo.  Necesita una reforma tanto en baños como en aislamiento. No tiene mosquitera y entran insectos en la habitación. Las habitaciones de la planta baja tienen humedad y olor. El desayuno aceptable....

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Typical country lodge with a nice atmosphere.  Rooms are spacious, clean and comfortable.  Upstairs rooms have a nice balcony overlooking the beautiful, well maintained garden.  Friendly service at reception.  |Breakfast is excellent, lots of choice.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: A little basic on rooms.walk down town and taxi back uphill cheap and easy

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The brown aesthetic looks rustic and homely but also makes the rooms a bit dark. The hotel in a fair spot in Monteverde with restaurants and shops a short walk away.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Man(n) soll mal nicht vergessen wo man ist.
Mir hat das Hotel gefallen, hübsch aufgebaut, kleine Räumlichkeiten zum lesen.....
Wer hier hinkommt,weiß das es im Nebelwald liegt, 1500 m hoch.
Alles sauber , super Personal.
Frühstück ist voll ok. Alles da.
Wir hatten Glück, könnten 1 × im Innenhof frühstücken. Aber auch das Restaurant ist ansprechend. Abendessen gut,
Preise ,wie andere auch.
Was will man mehr.
Einziger Mangel, es ist sehr hellhörig.

Mai 2025

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Overall, a very good hotel — but with one “but”… The hotel grounds are nice, the staff is very friendly and helpful, and the breakfasts are good.
The “but” is the room choice. I picked a standard room, and that was a bit of a mistake. The room was very dark with tiny windows, no real place to sit, and most importantly, the walls seemed very thin with almost no sound insulation. So your sleep really depends on your neighbors. I had cheerful seniors — could have been worse :-)
I recommend booking a better room category — they looked nicer from the outside, with big windows or even a balcony.
The walk to the town center takes about 15–20 minutes, but keep in mind that Monteverde is quite hilly.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Great ambiance, location, staff service one of the best I have known for group reservations.  It’s very clean but unfortunately, last year, we encountered ourselves with an “alacrán” in the bedroom.
Delicious, fresh breakfast and the swimming pool service with Poco Poco hotel was a super service very appreciated for students groups like this one.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Fijn hotel, met fijne kamers. Goed verzorgd complex met mooie tuin en veel zit/ligplekken. Ontbijt vonden we wel iets minder; minder keuze en iets mindere kwaliteit vergeleken met andere hotels tijdens de trips. Restaurant was ons een tikje te culinair, maar voldoende alternatieven in de buurt.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Very well maintained Hotel with friendly employees, cleaned rooms and nice gardens.
The restaurant is worth a visit, i suggest to try beef burger.

Only negative was the noise insulation between the rooms seems to be not very good.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
We’re not thrilled with the room, but the grounds are great and the staff is friendly.  There is plenty of road noise but at night it’s pretty quiet.
The room was basic and the bed and bedding seemed old. There’s a huge amount of banging pipes whenever someone turns off the hot water. The towels were clean, but not quite dry and there’s no AC to dry anything out because the climate is so mild but humid.
There’s a small tv with local channels, not sure what good that does foreigners. The ability to sign into our Netflix account would’ve been great. Another lodge that we stayed at in Costa Rica had that.
The breakfast included was very filling with lots of options, including what seem to be typical Costa Rican breakfast. Good coffee.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Top experience. Very clean and well maintained rooms. Very spacious too.
The breakfast could be improved in terms of choices but everything freshly made.
Try the restaurant too. The best food we had in the area. Value for money also. 35USD/person for 2 burgers, 1 pizza, 2 glasses of wine and 2 margaritas. (Their burger is top)

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Habitaciones amplias, pero poco aisladas. Se escucha todo, además tanto por la puerta como ventanas se filtra el aire. Trato del personal bueno, mención especial a Jennifer de recepción por su ayuda y explicaciones.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Un complejo hotelero muy completo en Monteverde. El restaurante tiene muy buen producto. El personal es encantador y muy atento. Si podemos volveremos a él.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: It was a decent stay. The staff were friendly and helpful. The room was clean and comfortable. There was no fan or AC which would have been nice in the middle of the day, but by night it was cool.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We had a fantastic stay here! We were celebrating our 30th wedding anniversary and the team here made it special for us with a sweet sign and chocolate covered strawberries. Quiet location, spacious rooms and an amazing breakfast buffet. The happy hour was fun too. We would certainly stay here again.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We spent 1 night. Great cozy hotel. Really friendly staff. Would recommend if in area.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Staff is nice. Onsite restaurant which has goood food. It’s little far from town 10 min walk. Bathroom was nice. Need little update.
No AC but provide fan. Colour out side front desk is dull need nice painting so it can look
Modern.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Très bon hôtel.  Très propre, bien entretenu.  Verre de bienvenue à l'arrivée et personnel accueillant et à l'écoute Petit déjeuner Très copieux. Accès à la piscine et au spa de Poco a poco.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Amazing service. Abby was so gracious and so helpful. A great place to stay. Great food.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Really nice lodge that is well taken care of. Staff speak in multiple languages and are willing to help interpret or give advice on food and tours. Abigail was super helpful booking us tours and ordering pizza when we were back.
Breakfast was good with lots of options, the only complaint would be because of the strong winds it was hard to sleep with the branches loudly banging against the building.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: asustan en las noches

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
It's a 3 star establishment but does everything required. The building is a little run down and basic but the grounds are pretty and well kept.
Small staff so they can be slow and you may have to queue for assistance.
It's also a bit outside town you'll need a vehicle to get anywhere.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: En la habitacion se escucha todo lo de la de al lado, hace mucho frío y el agua caliente no funcionaba. El personal lo arregló rápido, nos ofreció otra habitación y pedimos un calefactor para poder dormir bien y arreglaron el agua caliente.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: You have to go down 500 steps and then back up 500 steps. Wear water shoes bc the rocks are slick; the fish are big too!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Beautiful fall. Surprise to see fishes swimming with people.It is a little charllenge to climb back from the bottom.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: This place is awesome. Totally worth the walk down the stairs and the walk back up. Make sure to bring clothes suitable to jump into the water (and a towel too). The jump into the water was so refreshing. Wonderful place for pictures, especially when you get to the bottom and are on the rocks.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Pretty waterfall. Lame we couldn't swim under it but still pretty

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Me ha encantado. 509 escalones. Es mejor ir a primera hora ya que habrá menos gente pero tampoco es un gran problema. Podrás hacerte fotos sin problemas. Hay una zona también para bañarse no donde está la cascada sino al lado. Visita obligada. De 10

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Had a wonderful time!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Ein Wasserfall, den man sich in dieser Umgebung anschauen muss. Unten glasklares Wasser, das zum Baden einlädt. Eine Security ist vor Ort. Der Weg mit 500 Stufen nach unten bzw. auch wieder noch oben setzt allerdings eine körperliche Grundfitness voraus. Touristen mit Herzvorerkrankungen sollten dies beherzigen und im Zweifel oben bleiben.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Very beautiful waterfall that is geared toward tourists. There’s decent amount of parking with nice restrooms, restaurant, and a shop, and you don’t have to purchase tickets in advance. There’s a view of the waterfall from up top if you or someone visiting cannot take the stairs down (lots of stairs), but it’s well maintained and relatively easy as long as you are physically capable. When you get to the waterfall, you have the option to go further and climb over rocks to get closer to the water and swim as well.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: El lugar es hermoso, las instalaciones amplias y limpias.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
Stunning waterfall in which you can also swim and refresh yourself in the river (more relaxing) or at the base of the waterfall (with care). To get to the water you have to pass through rocks, so water shoes or sandals are recommended. At the entrance there are restroom and changing facilities, including showers. The 500 steps to get in and out in my opinion were not as challenging as other people are saying, but probably it is quite subjective.
I visited as part of a guided tour but I don't recommend it, as I would have liked to have more time to enjoy at my own pace. The only advantage is to have someone looking at your stuff. I saw people leaving backpacks and bags around but I don't know whether it is safe or not.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Several stairs down but worth every step

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Our Corcovado National Park tour was an absolute dream come true! The sheer biodiversity and natural beauty of this place is simply mind-blowing. From the moment we stepped foot in the park, we were in awe!

Our guide, Eduardo, was exceptional. His deep knowledge of the park's animals, coupled with his passion for nature, made the experience very special. He had a knack for spotting wildlife, and we were fortunate enough to witness some incredible sights: pumas, toucans, monkeys, dolphins, and much more.

If you're looking for an unforgettable adventure in Costa Rica, I highly recommend this Corcovado tour. With Eduardo as your guide, you're in for an extraordinary experience.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: The tour of the Corcovado Reserve was great, the guide Eduardo was professional, with a lot of knowledge and determination to find animals for us, and we were indeed able to see a puma about 10 meters away from us. There was attention to every detail and to everyone.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Amazing slice of natural beauty. Great place to see wildlife and bask in the beauty of the rainforest. It is a healthy second growth forest and contains many species of flora and fauna.

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Wonderful place ! A little place of paradise where the nature stay wild.

Being accompanied with a guide is a must !  We did it with Bahia tour and it was great 🤩 Our guide, Andres, was speaking English perfectly and got the perfect knowledge of the animals and plants

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Nos lluvio un poquito, pero vimos muchos animales y disfrutamos del paseo con alguna aventura y algún toque de adrenalina.

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Lieu mythique pour les amateurs d' animaux. Abondance d' animaux et entre d'animaux plus rares tels les tapis et les jaguars

title: Corcovado National Park
text: Magical place!

title: Corcovado National Park
text:
Der Park an sich sowie die Strände sind traumhaft schön. So viel Natur auf einem Raum. Die Tour war gut geplant und wir haben sehr viele Tiere gesehen. (Schildkröten , Wale , eine Schlange , Affen , Ameisen , ein Tapir und sehr viele Vögel) Unser Tour Guide war cool drauf und für jedes Späßchen zu haben.

Man wird mit einem Boot abgeholt. Wer Seekrank ist oder Angst vor Wasser hat sollte dies vorher bedenken , weil man wird aufjedenfall nass. Auch im Park sind die Wege sehr matschig deshalb eignen sich am besten Gummistiefel.

Zum Schluss gab es noch ein leckeres Mittag/Abendessen in einem Restaurant.

Ich würde die Tour jedem weiterempfehlen.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Really nice, quaint, older hotel. Well kept, just older. Rooms were nice and clean, but you gotta get up early if you want a hot shower. Hotel Restaurant food was really good. Location is about a 10-15 minute walk to a small shopping center, restaurants at the shopping center as well as all around the lodge. Restaurant prices are about the same as U.S. prices. Best part of Lodge was excellent service from the staff.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: The lobby set my expectations too high. No AC but was not needed as it was cool night and very windy area. My room was musty smelling and ants on sink and crawling on me in bed. Dirty toilet and would not even use shower. Thankfully it was only one night.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Besonderer Ort, super Service, etwas außerhalb.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: We stayed two nights at Monteverde Country Lodge. Nice hotel area, consisting of several independent villages with rooms. The room was quite small, but the space was enough for two people, since you are away on activities, the time in the room is not that long. The bed is small for two, but there was also a sofa bed. For the pool you need to go to the sister hotel, which we did not do. Nice and cheerful staff. Breakfast ok, nothing more. We had a dinner and it was good, a pizza and a starter were enough to share. Walking distance to several restaurants, small shops and the center. Note! Height differences, so expect uphills, good for the pedometer :-)

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Super freundliche und hilfsbereite Mitarbeiter.|Sehr gepflegte Anlage mit tierischem Besuch.|Immer sehr sauber.|Leider (oder auch gut)  etwas außerhalb ( ca.400m).|Taxi fährt für 5 Dollar zum nächsten Restaurant.|Eigenes Restaurant auch sehr gut.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Happy our bij dit hotel! Met een wijntje van 16 dollar 😂

Dit hotel is knettergek. Nooit meer en adviseer het niet aan.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
This is a fine place to stay. The staff are cheerful and helpful. The restaurant is fine for dinner. Breakfast is only ok, with poor cereal options.
The room was adequate, with enough room for our stuff and a porch on which to sit, but it was horribly windy the whole time.
The location is down a fairly steep hill from the main road, but within easy walk to the Butterfly Garden and some nature reserves. It is a huge, steep hill down and up to town and other places to eat. We are one night at the restaurant right across the street, which was nice as well.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Tijdens onze reis door costa rica hebben wij 2 nachten overnacht in dit hotel. Het hotel wss erg mooi aan de buitenkant en het personeel was vriendelijk. De kamers waren schoon maar een beetje saai. Ook lag het hotel best ver buiten het dorpje

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Fuimos unos días en familia… no íbamos con muchas expectativas porque habíamos leído unos comentarios no muy buenos…|Realmente, nos sorprendió para bien.|El hotel muy lindo, las habitaciones cómodas, amplias, limpias… |Es verdad que no hay aire acondicionado, pero no lo necesitás… las noches son muy frescas. Igualmente hay un ventilador de piso que nunca lo prendimos. |El desayuno, rico y variado. Si querés, podés cenar. Platos abundantes y a buen precio.|El personal, recontra amable.|Ideal para ir, super recomendable.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Close to many attractions.
Room is very clean.  The property layout and landscaping is very nice.  We enjoyed the unique moisture in air, rain.
People complains about smell in room, but this exists in all heavy moisture locations that doesn’t have dehumidifier.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Jennifer at the reception was amazing. Location is so beautiful and scenic. Rooms were cozy and super clean

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Unpleasant odour in room.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Wir waren nach der 2-ten Nacht abgereist. Sehr ringhöriges Zimmer, auf der Erdgeschoss-Etage ist leider vom Obergeschoss sämtliche Bewegungen zu hören man könnte meinen Elefanten sind im OG einquartiert. Das Zimmer sehr muffelig feucht….. das Hotel eher im untere Durchschnitt.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Tolles Resort mit den thermalen Quellen als Highlight. Viele verschiedene Pools mit unterschiedlichen Temperaturen. Dazu sehr leckeres Frühstück. Personal ist super freundlich. Da das Resort sehr groß ist, wird ein Shuttle Service angeboten, den wir gerne in Anspruch genommen haben.
Unser Zimmer war sehr sauber, aber ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Das Abendessen im Restaurant entsprach nicht ganz unserem Geschmack, was nicht bedeuten soll, dass es nicht gut ist.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: exelente hotel, habitaciones muy comodas la comida y el servicio muy bueno

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Muy lindo lugar, la naturaleza hermosa que rodea. Todo bien cuidaso, las piscinas termales muy lindas. Super recomendable.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Wir hatten 4 Nächte im Hotel und waren begeistert. Die Pools sind ein Traum für die ganze Familie und man hat in der Umgebung viele Möglichkeiten für Aktivitäten. Die Zimmer sind groß und man hat bei gutem Wetter einen tollen Ausblick auf den Vulkan. Die einzige Einschränkung ist, dass die Zimmer sehr hellhörig sind. Restaurant war auch super - sowohl das Frühstücksbuffet als auch das Abendmenü.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Beautiful lanscape at hotsprings.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Este hotel es excelente y las instalaciones son simplemente fascinantes, cuenta con jardines increíbles y un mirador alucinante,  se pasa muy bien en el lago.  El único punto en contra es la comida del restaurante, los precios son muy altos y el sabor y calidad de comida no está a la altura, al menos no la que sirven en el bar de piscina.   El desayuno incluido realmente es muy bueno, es estilo buffet y el sabor es excelente, sumamente recomendado, la estadía es muy grata.  La mejor parte son las habitaciones pues son muy amplias y hermosas. Sin duda volveremos.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Wow! Best hôtel!! 100%!!!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Excelente hotel, piscinas de agua fría y termales impecables, zonas verdes muy bien cuidadas, servicio de restaurante muy bueno y el personal sumamente atento y amable. Súper recomendable.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Pur family of 6 stayed here the last few days.  Wr had to move rooms after the first day.  The first room was much nicer.  The toilet area was separate from the sink and shower which was great for us.  The 2nd room was older but did have a better view.  Neither room had a sitting area which would have been nice. The resort is very spread out so most likely will require shuttle service to and from the pool. There is also not a good common area to sit and have a drink and play games during big rains. The shuttle drivers were awesome.  The pool areas were really nice but not a lot of sitting room.  My big issues was the cost.  The bar charges way too much for food and drinks.  Service at the bar was not great.  We had several times where drinks got mixed up.  I also think we were over charged more than once.  We took the hike to the volcanoes view and came across a group of howler monkeys which was cool.  Be be warned the map makes it look close but it is almost 2 mile hike up hill.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Un lugar absolutamente increíble y recomendado!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Muy lindo el hotel, el servicio es bueno y al menos la habitación que fuimos estaba muy linda. Tienen pases de día entonces las termales se pueden sentir muy llenas.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
A great place to unwind with numerous options and opportunities for adventure and self care all around.  Outstanding views of el Volcan Arenal and La Fortuna.

Large swimming pool with a water slide and thermal pools as well.  Bar with western fare, a restaurant serving an extensive breakfast buffet with fresh fruit, cheese, Pancakes, French toast, omelets and pastries.  The dinner serves typical Costa Rican cuisine as well as Italian and Asian.

Room service is also an option.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
One of the best hotel I stayed in. It was very spacious. The room was beautiful and clean. What's the most impressive is the hot spring. It has multiple hot springs and is very comfortable. Also, the resort has very beautiful tropical plants. Everywhere is super well designed.

We also took horseback riding in the backside of the mountain. You can't imagine how big the resort is. We rode for 1 hour and 45 minutes and also saw so many hundreds of horses overall. It was definitely recommended.

Oh, by the way, I think the breakfast was really good as well. A lot of fruits and pastries, and the coffee was very good.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Increíble lugar de lujo, sólo tuvimos el daypass para acceder a las aguas termales e incluía bufette, aunque fue a la carta porque había poca gente, igual nos encantó. Súper recomendable.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Joli hôtel le personnel réception fantastique pour chaque demande 3 minutes après cela était fait. Vraiment très très satisfaite du personnel, cadre exceptionnel, bon petit déjeuner buffet riche et varié , j’ai vu des singes dans les arbres dans la cour ❤️, petits restaurants très sympas ainsi que petits commerces  à proximité . Je recommande !

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: No AC but need it as it was December. Not sure how hot the rooms get in the summer. No hot water and the lights kept going out. Breakfast was not that great. I wouldn’t stay here again.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: This hotel was booked by our agent and they must have booked the economy room as it was dreadful. Small hot and poky. No air con, fridge, hairdryer or safe. Nowhere to hang clothes or even to put the suitcases. A small bathroom with not even a shelf to put toothbrushes on and the toilet that wasn't very clean either. The shower was very temperamental with a shower curtain. The worst was it was next door to what must have been the place where the staff kept all the equipment as from 4.45 people were backwards and forwards outside our window, talking and banging and clattering. We asked to change rooms and the friendly helpful womn at reception got us a new room. This was much better, larger with a safe and hairdryer and coffee maker. Still no air con or fridge but there was more space and the shower had a glass door and the sink had space for our toothbrushes. The grounds of the hotel are pretty and well kept and the breakfast was very good. We had lunch in the restaurant and this was also good with friendly helpful staff. It's an older hotel that needs money spent on it and actually the room we were in to begin with shouldn't even be used. Booked the superior rooms if you decide to stay here.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Bel endroit, on s’y est très bien senti! Personnel agréable et petit déjeuner varié et de très bonne qualité pour bien commencer la journée! On est à petite distance d’autres commodités et il y a beaucoup d’activités à faire. Je recommande!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Nice hotel with friendly staff

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Die Hotelanlage ist sehr schön, allerdings hat es während unseres Aufenthalts durchgehend geregnet. Das Geräusch wurde vom Dach deutlich verstärkt, so dass es nachts extrem laut und störend war. Zudem war vor dem Zimmer ein zwar hübscher Brunnen, der aber nachts nicht abgeschaltet wurde und die Geräuschkulisse noch verstärkte.
Im Zimmer gab es kaum Möglichkeiten, etwas aufzuhängen. Trocknen konnte man nichts, da die Luftfeuchtigkeit auch im Zimmer sehr hoch war.
Das Frühstück ist in Ordnung, bietet aber keine allzu große Auswahl. Der Service sowohl an der Rezeption, vor allem aber im Restaurant war sehr gut und aufmerksam.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Lo único bueno de este lugar es el personal que está súper atento y súper amable. Las habitaciones llenas de hormigas.. el cuarto de baño y por las mesas.. súper incómodo y sin poder dormir

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Un hotel estándar. Buena comida.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Magnifica atencion
Habitación muy cuidada,adaptada para personas mayores con dificultad de movimiento

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Leider nicht zu empfehlen, uns hat es gar nicht gefallen, war das schlechteste Hotel auf unserer Rundreise :(
Das Zimmer war dunkel und feucht (man konnte nichts trocknen und es regnet in Monteverde sehr oft) und im Zimmer war es immer muffig. Auch die Zimmer an sich waren alt und haben uns nicht gefallen.
Der Service, also die Ladies an der Rezeption waren sehr nett und hilfsbereit, das ist der Pluspunkt am Hotel.
Die Lage ist okay, direkt drum herum gibt es nicht viel, in 5-10 Minuten zu Fuß erreicht man gute Restaurants.
Dad Frühstück hat uns auch gar nicht abgeholt. Sehr lieblos angerichtet und hat uns auch nicht geschmeckt. Obwohl es schon gebucht war, sind wir am zweiten Tag nicht mehr zum Frühstück.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Schmutzige Bettwäsche vorgefunden sonst o.k.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text:
Negative reviews are warranted. The staff was actually surprisingly rude and made us wait in one particular area and wouldn’t let us wander the restaurant (for memory pics)

Food wasn’t great unfortunately. Dishes were unimaginative (catered to tourists I suppose) and tastes a bit old. Also took a long time to come out despite us coming right at opening. Overall, there are much better options here in La Fortuna

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: The atmosphere and food were incredible and our server, Bayardo, was the BEST! A great place to celebrate a birthday too.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Put it this way. The food was so good that I forgot to take pictures of the meals!! Me and my wife had a blast at this restaurant. Very clean, very good service and chicken dinner was excellent!! We had combo #6 for a meal.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Food & vibe were very solid. High prices and outrageously slow service though.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: It was very hot in the day time no enough than or AC.  The food was delicious

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Highly recommend, the food and service was excellent. We ate here twice out of the 3 days we were in La Fortuna.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text:
Unser bestes Essen in Costa Rica  und morgen scheint die Sonne
Pura vida

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text:
Excelente servicio,muy buen ambiente y comida bien fresca
Muy buena atención de Jimmy
Altamente recomendable

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: I had a great time here for my birthday my waiter Jimmy was really attentive. They brought in a dessert and sang Happy Birthday.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text:
Spanish: Acabamos de comer aquí hoy, 23 de mayo alrededor de la 1 PM. Pollo Fortuneño tiene un ambiente súper divertido, acogedor e invitante. Honestamente, fue uno de los lugares con mejor ambiente que hemos visitado en La Fortuna. La comida estaba bastante buena también, especialmente los sándwiches.

Lamentablemente, el servicio arruinó gran parte de la experiencia. Nuestro mesero, Wayner, desde el principio parecía no querer atendernos. La sonrisa se sentía forzada y, después de tomar la orden, nunca volvió a revisar cómo estábamos.

Con el calor que hacía, estábamos deshidratados y tuvimos que pedirle agua a otros meseros porque él nunca regresó a nuestra mesa. Honestamente, creemos que por esa falta de atención terminamos recibiendo papas fritas viejas, frías y sin sal.

Para empeorar las cosas, tuvimos que pedirle al gerente una caja para llevar y también la cuenta, y encima nos cobraron por la caja.

Entendemos perfectamente que todos pueden tener un mal día. Pero aun así, los clientes merecen un servicio básico y atención. Excelente ambiente, buena comida, pero una experiencia de servicio realmente mala.

English:

We just ate here today, May 23 around 1 PM. Pollo Fortuneño has such a fun, inviting atmosphere. Honestly, it was one of the better vibes we’ve experienced in La Fortuna. The food itself was pretty damn good too, especially the sandwiches.

Unfortunately, the service really brought the experience down. Our server, Wayner, from the very beginning acted like he wanted nothing to do with us. Any smile felt forced, and after taking our order, he never checked on us again.

With the heat and weather, we were dehydrated and had to rely on other servers just to get water refills because he never came back to the table. Honestly, we believe that lack of attention is why we ended up being served old fries that were cold and had no salt.

To make matters worse, we had to ask the manager ourselves for a to-go box and for the check, and then we were actually charged for the box.

We completely understand that everyone can have a bad day. But customers still deserve basic service and attention. Great atmosphere, solid food, but a really disappointing service experience.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Bbq Wings were big and juicy

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Estuve visitándolos dos veces en una misma semana y sin duda alguna el mejor lugar que comí en la fortuna. Desde la comida hasta el delicioso postre. Debo resaltar el servicio de nuestro mesero Jimmy y el Sr. Carlos. Demasiado amables y de los mejores servicios que he recibido. Todo muy rápido! Ya quiero volver a este país para visitar este lugar 🙏🏻

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: אוכל טעים מאוד, מחירים סבירים

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Highly recommend! Being in la fortuna 7 days my boyfriend and I came 5 days, whether it was for drinks or to eat the experience was a 10/10. Jimmy served us every time and made sure we enjoyed everything. My most favorite was the agua chiles, those were the star of the show!

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Buen precio para la calidad que es, increíble.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: This is one of the best restaurants we've been to in a while. Everything was fantastic and the prices were so reasonable. The chicken was amazing and the smoothies were incredible.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muy cómodo hotel, buen servicio,  instalaciones muy lindas.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: To get here you must ensure  "the from hell!"

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Un hotel espectacular, buen trato y amabilidad por parte de todos los trabajadores. Restaurante muy bueno tanto para desayunos como para el resto de comidas.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel muy bonito, con una atención excelente en todo momento. El restaurante está muy bueno y unos precios muy acordes. El personal es muy amable.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Un hotel correcto, no más.
Las habitaciones correctas pero necesitan una remodelacion. La puerta de entrada a la habitación tenía muchos huecos. La iluminación escasa. Las camas son cómodas. No hay armarios. Tampoco hay secador y teniendo en cuenta la humedad ambiental hubiera sido de agradecer.
El hotel está apartado del centro y es recomendable ir en taxi dado que hay cuestas , además de distancia.
El restaurante está muy bien, de hecho salva el hotel. Allí comimos y cenamos muy bien los dos días que estuvimos. Los meseros del restaurante muy bien. Los que nos atendieron fueron muy atentos, tanto Fernando como Daniel fueron muy atentos y profesionales. El resto de personal del hotel fue amable pero la atencion fue justa, no hubo nada a destacar.
El hotel no tiene piscina.
Resumen, un hotel correcto, justito.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: There is very little separating rooms so it is very noisy. You can hear everything from the rooms next door and above. The staff were very friendly and helpful and the food was very good

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Pretty basic.  Wait staff were great.  Employees arrive at 5am and will wake you up.  No AC.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Fantástico alojamiento.
El trato ha sido magnífico, Natalia nos atendió en recepción y fue muy atenta.
El buffet del desayuno excepcional y los dos días de estancia cenamos en el restaurante porque llovía mucho y muy buena relación calidad precio ya que la calidad de la comida era fantástica.
La única pega que le he podido encontrar es que nuestra habitación estaba en la planta de arriba y al ser tejado de chapa se oía la lluvia mucho pero no nos molestó para dormir en absoluto.
Muchas gracias a todos los trabajadores por la estancia tan buena que nos han hecho pasar.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: El desayuno es un poco justo y no hay mucha variedad, las habitaciones no están mal ,pero no tienen nevera y no están insonorizadas con lo cual oyes a tus vecinos, si quieres bajar al pueblo toca caminar unos 20-25 minutos o coger un taxi

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Hotel agradable amb un menjador molt acollidor i romàntic.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Dicht bij monte verde park en dorpje Santa Elena hebben wij hier 2 nachten overnacht. in het regenseizoen  waarbij het ok steeds  regende had je weinig mogelijkheden om je poncho's te drogen, je kleding en schoenen te drogen.  dat was jammer.
Bedden lagen na 2 nachten niet lekker meer door de harde veren.

restaurant en service verder prima

via het hotel een nachtwandeling geboekt. ging snel en was top.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Nice hotel. New rooms and older rooms. All somewhat noisy. No AC. Good breakfast buffet. Lovely cocktails.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Las habitaciones son húmedas, no tienen ventilador, y la puerta y ventanas no aislan nada el ruido, en el pasillo de acceso hay una luz que se queda toda la noche encendida e ilumina la habitación.
En nuestro caso, lo peor fue que por las noches por la ventana del baño entraban muchísimas hormigas y el baño se llenaba de ellas, cuando se lo dijimos al personal su respuesta fue que aquí eran bienvenidas y no nos dieron mayor solución por lo que por las noches era incomodisimo y muy desagradable ir al baño.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Fantastic lodge in a beautiful setting.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Súper atención del personal

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Para aclarar alguna duda que a mí me surgió al leer algunas reseñas:
- Actualmente al menos no tiene piscina (entiendo que las fotos de piscina son antiguas)
- No hay ni aire acondicionado ni ventilador, para nosotros no fue un problema porque hacia más bien fresquito fuera
- Sí hay secador para el pelo
- Está a 25 minutos andando del centro pero es prácticamente todo cuesta. Si se tiene coche no es problema
- A nosotros nuestra habitación nos gustó porque tenía vistas a una zona ajardinada muy bonita y un pequeño balconcillo
- El personal fue muy amable

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Great hotel with excellent facilities and staff. The staff go out of their way to help and answer questions. The bar is small and next to the restaurant which was pleasent. We had a suite which had loads of space - lounge and 2 bedrooms. Would highly recommend if visiting monteverde.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Nice country lodge not far from any tourist locations. All the staff were courteous and helpful. Abby at front desk helped plan for all the tours. She is very good at what she does. Breakfast was excellent.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Me encantó,  muy amables,  desayuno delicioso,  habitaciones amplias y limpias, espero volver pronto

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text:
Muchas gracias por esta estancia.
Precioso detalle sorpresa por nuestras bodas de plata.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Clean rooms, generally comfy beds, nice restaurant for dinner (mango colada is a must) and good spread for breakfast. Agreed that it can definitely be noisy, with the way the wind blows down the halls but also some rooms off the restaurant area. Walkable to town but a HUGE hill to climb on the way back to the hotel. About a $5 cab to the town center or back. Some restaurants within a walkable distance (without the hill to climb).

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Muchisimo ruido. Suelos y techos de madera, lo que hace que los demas huespedes de las habitaciones de al lado y arriba parezca que los tengas en tu propia habitacion. Y para colmo, a las 6:30 a.m. ya no hay agua caliente para ducharte. No volveria ahí.

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Las habitaciones son muy húmedas. La ropa aunque no esté mojada se queda húmeda. No hay ni aire acondicionado ni ventilador. El servicio es bueno. Lo mejor es el desayuno. Buffet muy variado y buenísimo, recomiendo el pan de banano, delicioso!

title: Monteverde Country Lodge
text: Not too far from the town center, this cute hotel is well maintained. It does not have air conditioning and no ceiling fans either. Probably would have been so much more comfortable with fans. The room have several windows with just nets for ventilation so it does cool down at night but can get hot during the day. Luckily we were out and about most of the day. The outsides are so pretty and make up for the rooms. The cleaning crew is always cleaning up the outside area. So many pretty flowers. Easy walk.to the reception and the dining area. Good buffet breakfast with standard items and fruits. The room have basic amenities. No fridge or microwave. A coffee machine. Plenty of outlets for charging. No chairs in the room but there are chairs right outside the room to sit and enjoy the outsides. Multi use shampoo ,conditioner , soap. Plenty of towels. Storage space, safe. Overall a comfortable stay. We did suggest at the front desk to at least add table top fans so it can be more comfortable in the rooms . Taxis are easily available to go to center of the city and back for $5. Lots of restaurants at walking distance and one right across from the lodge. Nice to walk around but it is very steep to walk from city to here. Luckily taxis have a standard fare. There is also a grocery store nearby.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
Our family of 4 (two kids ages 9 and 12 and two adults) recently went to La Fortuna waterfall while in Costa Rica. We would recommend checking out this waterfall while in La Fortuna. The waterfall is beautiful and worth seeing for sure!!

We spent about an hour at the waterfall. The 530 steps down to and back up from the waterfall is a good hike but definitely worth it and totally do-able for moderately active kids and adults. When we got down to the waterfall we took some pictures and ventured into the waterfall for a quick dip. The water is quite cold and most visitors didn't go into the water for more than a picture (if even that)- so just keep that in mind!! This isn't a place you are going to go and stay for the day to hang out!

We also spent a bit of time downstream from the waterfall where it was a little less busy. The scenery there was beautiful and my kids liked seeing all the fish!

A few things I will note about the waterfall:

1) It is quite busy. So keep that in mind. You will need to wait at photo op spots to take pictures, getting into the waterfall can be challenging around all the people, etc. It was a little frustrating at time because many people were having full blown photoshoots blocking paths, when other tourists are just trying to get to the waterfall and enjoy their time there.

2) My kids were a bit bored. Yes- at a stunning waterfall in nature. They did like it and were happy to go but once we got down they would have been happy to hike right back up the stairs and leave. The water is cold for swimming so once we saw it and took it all in, they were ready to head back out. So- you may be paying for a very quick visit!

3) It is not accessible. If you have any mobility issues or injuries this is not for you. Beyond the many stairs, the rocks and surfaces are slippery and challenging to navigate.

I would recommend you bring water shoes and towels for everyone!!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
My friends and I enjoyed an early morning hike down to the waterfall.  We arrived a bit before 8:00 which was a great to avoid crowds.  Although there are approximately 500 steps down to the bottom of the falls, and back up, there are plenty of platforms or benches to rest.  The steps and handrails are well-maintained.  We chose not to swim but there are several areas at the bottom to get in the water.  The park also has a butterfly garden.

The falls are stunning and well worth the small entrance fee.   We did not purchase tickets ahead of time but it may be advisable to do so in peak season.  I definitely recommend seeing the La Fortuna falls.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
What a cool experience! 10/10 recommend while in La Fortuna - it is beautiful and so fun!
The stairs are well maintained all the way down (and up). There are a lot of places to rest if you want as well. We went on a day that was overcast, which was perfect due to the cooler temp for the hike. The water was great and refreshing! I wore Teva sandals  so I could wear them on the rocks and to swim which worked really well.
We bought a ticket online the day before and just took an Uber from our hotel and it cost a fraction of the price of a tour.

Lindas vistas al llegar a la cascada y al ingresar a ella a bañarse el entorno de roca y vegetación que envuelve el lugar es mágico. Fuimos cercano al medio día por lo que sí había bastante gente, y lamentablemente no todos son respetuosos con el espacio ajeno o el ruido que pudiese molestar a lo demás, pero no alcanza a empañar lo majestuoso del paisaje. El agua es fria pero muy refrescante y recomiendan mantenerse en la orilla, aunque a un costado hay un acceso a un rio bastante bajo donde puede disfrutar con mayor seguridad y hay muchos peces que no se alejan de tus pies. En el sendero se puede observar fauna como tucanes, monos, lagartos y mariposas. Totalmente recomendado!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Great views and a must see if you’re in La Fortuna. You can buy tickets ahead which saves some time when you get there. All you need to do is sign the liability waiver and head out. Remember, it’s 500+ steps down… which means it’ll be 500+ steps up! It’s worth it though if you’re able to take the steps. The water is cold and the rocks are very slippery, so be careful. When you get down, there’s an easy way to get in the water on the left (around the bend and away from the main waterfall). It’s a safer way of getting your feet wet without having to walk over slippery rocks. No bathrooms on the way down or at the waterfall, so make sure you go before you head down.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
We visited this spot using a day pass, and it turned out to be a fantastic way to spend the afternoon. For anyone planning a visit, we paid $30 for the pass without the buffet, though I believe the price is $50 when it is available. A quick tip: the buffet is subject to availability, especially if there are large groups arriving, so if there is not so many people you will not have it.

The facilities are impressive. The swimming pools are really nice and well-maintained, offering something for everyone. If you are looking for a bit of an adrenaline rush, they have some pretty quick slides that are a lot of fun, no matter your age! After the slides, the thermal water is the perfect way to relax, though be prepared—it is genuinely hot, exactly what you want from a natural spring experience.

One piece of advice for those looking for a bit of peace: while the area near the bar is lively, the music can get quite loud. If you prefer a more tranquil environment, we highly recommend heading to the upper pool. It is much more "chill" up there and allows you to really take in the surroundings. The entire complex is set against a fantastic view of the volcano, providing a breathtaking backdrop that makes the whole experience feel like a luxury getaway. Whether you want to play on the slides or just soak with a view, this place is well worth the visit!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
If you are debating whether or not to book this experience, let me settle it for you: it is worth every single cent we paid. From start to finish, the entire day felt like stepping directly into a high-end travel magazine.
I had read several comments online about the difficulty of the trail, and I’ll admit I was a bit nervous. However, in my experience, the hike is not nearly as bad as people say. As long as you have a decent pair of shoes and a bit of stamina, it is perfectly manageable and actually quite enjoyable. The path offers several vantage points that give you a taste of what’s to come, keeping you motivated the whole way down.
Once you arrive at the destination, the reward is simply breathtaking. The water is crystal clear—perfect for a refreshing swim after the walk—and the surroundings are pristine. You truly feel like you are looking at a view from a postcard. We spent a good amount of time just floating in the water and soaking in the landscape; it’s one of those rare places where the reality actually lives up to the photos you see online.
If you are looking for a mix of light adventure and pure relaxation, do not skip this. It was easily the highlight of our trip, and I would do it again in a heartbeat. Five stars all the way!

title: Catarata Río Fortuna

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Beautiful waterfall with blue-turquoise water. The access requires to walk down 500 steps and then 500 up but the view and experience definitely worth it. On the right side of the waterfall, in the river, there are multiple stones where you can use to seat around and submerge yourself into the river relaxing. There is also small area with fishes swimming next to you. Very cute. There is lifeguards and security who are doing a great job. The lockers, bathrooms and showers are located upstairs at the entrance area. There is also a restaurant or coffee place too. You can be lucky to see some wildlife including monkeys and toucans. I recommend coming to this park and enjoy it at your own pace. I didn’t feel the need of a guide at all. The entrance is about 20$ US. Locker is 2-3$ US + you need 5,000 or more colones of deposit.

text:
The resort location is amazing 😍 and the hot springs are good however the rooms are rustic. It has an amazing view but the decor is old and needs a refresh.

Check out the look out and also the lake. Saw wild boars!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Hermoso! Pero precios excesivos en el bar.

Mi familia y yo pagamos el pase del día para disfrutar de las aguas termales. Pagamos 27,000 colones por persona con almuerzo buffet incluido.

- Hay muchas piscinas pequeñas de aguas termales y varias piscinas de agua fría.
- El sitio de lockers, baños y vestidores es espacioso y limpieza excelente. Traigan sus propios paños porque cobran $2 por rentar una toalla.
- Mi parte favorita de las piscinas termales fueron las camas de hidromasaje en pareja. ¡Deliciosas y relajantes!
- Son 2km hasta el mirador. Para que lo tomen en cuenta por si pensaban caminar hasta allá.
- El almuerzo buffet estuvo bien. Varias opciones de ensalada, dos opciones de jugos naturales, dos opciones de proteínas, varios acompañamientos y 3 opciones de postre.
- No recomiendo el bar interno para nada. Es excesivamente caro. Una cerveza y una orden de frijoles pequeña costó más de 6,000 colones. Una piña colada cuesta 6,900 colones.
- Si recomiendo pagar por el almuerzo buffet. Pero no recomiendo comprar nada en el bar interno. Excesivamente caro.
- Traten de ir en temporada baja. Fuimos un sábado de fin de semana largo y estaba demasiado lleno! Los Lagos podría tratar de controlar un poco mejor el aforo los días más concurridos. Costó mucho encontrar donde sentarse.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: This review is mainly for whom ever owns the resort. We were booked here via our travel agency and based on the pictures it looked luxurious with well kept rooms and the area as well. Well, when we got to our room, I was honestly disappointed. The room was clean but it is due for some TLC and not well kept. The furniture is very old the bathroom floor is peeling and the mirror was stained with paint? I'm not sure. Let's just say it is time for them rooms to have renovation. I would advise if you want something well updated and we'll kept and you want to stay here, check out the villas?..the people were nice here and tried their best. But honestly, I would not stay here next time.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Our room was a bit dated, but very clean and functional, bed was comfy. The pools are awesome and what to say about the view on the volcano and at the top for the sunset, absolutely loved it! 😍🌅🌴🌋

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Fue el primer lugar donde nos hospedamos en Costa Rica y superó nuestras expectativas. La limpieza, el servicio, las piscinas con toboganes para los niños, termas, vistas… toda la estancia fue espectacular. Recomendamos mucho este sitio!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Our family of 4 stayed here for 3 nights, and it was wonderful. Our room was one of the biggest I have ever stayed in - we requested a roll away cot, and I was not expecting a full trundle bed that could be pulled out from underneath the other 2 beds in the room. The view of the Rainforest and Volcano were breathtaking. Our children (ages 6 and 10) loved the pools, the (very fast) water slides and the hot springs. The campus is sprawling, so it was nice that they offer a shuttle as our room was up towards the top of a very long hill.|If we find ourselves returning to Costa Rica I would stay here again.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Si quiere un destino que tiene de todo, ese es el lugar, el desayuno está incluido y es exquisito, frutas, quesos, galletas, omelette, exc café, y un servicio al cliente de 100, cabalgatas, aguas termales, bellos  jardines

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
We had an amazing stay at Los Lagos Spa & Thermal Resort Experience, and it was absolutely perfect for families with kids! The highlight of our trip was definitely the pools—there are so many to choose from, including fun water slides and shallow areas that kept the kids entertained for hours.

The thermal pools are beautifully designed and surrounded by lush greenery, giving the whole place a relaxing yet adventurous vibe. It’s the kind of spot where both kids and adults can have a great time at the same time.

Definitely a kid friendly place and the free breakfast is just next level good. ( Omelette counter as well.)

The property itself is spacious and well-maintained, with plenty to explore. Waking up to views of nature (and even spotting wildlife around the resort) made the experience even more special.

If you're traveling with kids and looking for a place that combines fun, relaxation, and a true Costa Rica experience, Los Lagos is a fantastic choice. We’d definitely come back!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Our four night stay was fabulous. The pools dreamy and never very crowded. My kids loved the waterslides. I liked that it all looked like a natural landscape and remained fairly quiet. The rooms were large with plenty of space for a family. The pullout trundle bed was perfect for my 11 year old. The breakfast buffet was one of the highlights. You eat fresh fruit and sip coffee while sitting next to the small nature preserve! ||We stayed in one of the furthest rooms but luckily we had a car to drive to the pools. However, this gave us the best view of the volcano and we really felt like we were in the middle of the jungle. ||If you don’t have a car it’s okay. My son and I called for the shuttle once and it came within five minutes. ||The volcano mirador on property should not be missed!||I suggest eating at the pool bar instead of the formal restaurant. It’s faster and you can eat in between thermal pool hopping. ||Most days we spent outside of the resort exploring but made sure to be back by late afternoon to enjoy the amenities.||Finally, a huge thank you to the cleaning staff. My son came down with a stomach bug and we needed an immediate cleaning and they came within 15 minutes and were so kind. ||I would 100% return.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Me molestó mucho que en recepción me dijeran que el almuerzo era a la carta cuando llegamos a almorzar me indica la chica que está en la entrada que es bufet la verdad me molesta que las información no sea clara la verdad el resto de la estancia va bien personal muy amable y atentos

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Our favorite location in La Fortuna. We return every time. Food and hot springs are fantastic, family friendly and overall so
Amazing

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Perfektes Hotel, alles sauber und gepflegt,  atemberaubende Naturkulisse. Haben Ziplining und Hängebrücken Tour direkt an der Rezeption gebucht für den nächsten Tag

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Fun place and good service. They made room  for our large group and it has a fun atmosphere.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text:
We wanted to end our trip on a high note, but what should have been a memorable last night in La Fortuna became a frustrating waiting game. While the food itself was good, the service was a complete disaster. Our drinks were forgotten, and our appetizers actually arrived before our beverages.
​To make matters worse, they charge extra for salsa—which turned out to be a single spoonful of "mango habanero" that wasn't even spicy. For a meal that cost well over $100 for two, these nickel-and-diming tactics and the subpar service are unacceptable. It feels like because the tip is automatically included, the staff has no incentive to actually provide a quality experience.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Nice looking place but besides that , food was horrible , aswell as service was horrible waited 2 hours n spent $110 for some of the worst plates I’ve had in my life.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Para ser un lugar turístico, los precios estan regulares,  las opciones para compatir como el pollo, las costillas deberian colocarle un pico de gallo eso no les va a incrementar costo del plato, más bien es un plus, aparte de las 2 opciones que trae, los extra como salsa bbq muy caros casi 2 mil colones y un ramekin pequeño.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: We ate here as a family of four yesterday. The food was bland and the atmosphere was dull. It was not good value for money. There are much better restaurants in Fortuna.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Delicious food. Friendly staff. We were recommended to go here by a Wave staff member earlier today after rafting. Glad we went with his recommendation.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Their food was delicious! Highly recommended!

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Ceviche was delicious. Tomahawk steak and sides were also great. Service from our server was exceptional. Place is beautiful and clean. You could never enjoy this level of meal for the price back home unless you do it yourself. Great staff, food and service!

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: ensaladas muy recomendadas, deliciosas

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Great ambiance, recommended by a local.  Definitely go here when you’re in La Fortuna.  Always busy.  Steaks, seafood, great drinks.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: The tropical ceviche is one of the best tasting dishes I've ever had in my life and the Fortuneño Smile cocktail was a 10/10 as well. Phenomenal food and drink. Absolutely come here to eat.

title: Restaurante Fortuneño
text: Excelente, también es una buena opción para nacionales

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Hot spring pools were very nice. Only some of the pools had benches to sit. Place was very clean but there are no trash cans around. Lots of tables and chairs but only a few lounge chairs which quickly get reserved. Did the included meal with the day pass. Was a very large buffet however food was mediocre, may have been better if it were hot but it was like warm at best. Favorites were the salad bar with delicious tropical dressing, pork belly, and fresh fruit.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Die Anlage ist gut gelegen. Coole Pools und eine nette Pool-Bar. Alles mit einem Hauch Amerika. Und ja, die Räume sind wirklich sehr ringhöhrig. Das Buffet ist reichhaltig und das Personal ist durch und durch sehr nett und zuvorkommend.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Great time at Los Lagos. The natural spring pools were fantastic, as was the included breakfast buffet each morning. We didn't do any of the activities onsite, as we found the ones outside the hotel far better. The hotel rooms could use some updating, otherwise I would have given 5 stars.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
One of the better Hot Springs in the area
food was great, friendly staff, cold, plunges, and hot tubs both available easy parking and access. Also, the price is right.
I didn’t spend the night or see the rooms

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Drie nachten verbleven met gezin met twee jonge kinderen.
Erg mooie locatie aan de voet van de vulkaan. Dit biedt vele mooie foto momenten. Vanaf ons balkon ook mooi uitzicht op.
Kamers schoon en ruim. Prima
Ontbijt buffet ook prima. Veel fruit, verse omeletten, altijd wat lekkers. Mist als Hollander wel iets meer brood variatie. Maar keuze genoeg verder.
Heerlijke zwembaden op verschillende temperaturen. Twee glijbanen die vrij wild zijn. Voor allerkleinsten niet geschikt. Moet je echt wel kunnen zwemmen.
Aardig personeel en lunch mogelijkheden zijn goed. Savonds hebben we elke keer op de bergkam gegeten met prachtig uitzicht. Dat is aan te raden

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Had an okay experience with the family. But day pass to try it. Just not the family experience I was hoping. Thermal pools are very dark, which is a bit unappealing to kids, perhaps typical of the volcán arenal thermal waters. Unfortunately, the water in the other normal pools is a bit too cold near in the afternoon (April time) which is difficult for kids to enjoy. Lastly, the water slide design for little kids is not great. Kids bump rather hard on the concrete slide before even making it to the pool. They get ejected almost like a projectile into the water, a bit unnerving for parents and kids. Lastly, probably a good can to bring your own towels or face a pretty steep towel rental (for some reason included or free towel use is an oddity in Costa Rica)

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Una opcion excepcional en la zona del Arenal, hotel, instalacones, piscinas climatizadas, habitaciones, todo es excepcional, es un sitio paradisiaco e increible, para repetir una y mil veces, todo un sueño de hotel.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Compré la pasadia,  el buffet fue muy bueno y la atención.
Definitivamente me quedaría en el hotel en una próxima vez

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: What a wonderful location and amazing natural pools and hot springs.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: I only paid for the day pass but it wasn't worth it for my family of 5. Drinks were expensive but good and the pools were busy. One of the other guests told us not to let our kids put their faces in the water because someone had gotten sick and they are unchlorinated. I worry about the slides in the cold pools. Thrust are fast and just dump you out. While it was fun, some kids were not waiting and I saw a few close calls of them landing on someone at the bottom.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Nos encantó!

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text:
Excelente servicio, muy aseado day pass sumamente accesible con una deliciosa alimentación estilo bufete.
Ideal para relajarse aún cuando llueve.

title: Hotel Los Lagos Spa & Resort
text: Very beautiful resort but needs to be a little more well lit near the entrance and surrounding area of the big slide. Very expensive but very beautiful resort. No microwave in my room. The breakfast buffet was delicious!😋

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Beautiful hike down and the waterfall is amazing. Swimming in the water at the waterfall was a lot of fun as well.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
Trois. Étoiles seulement pour ce site.
Plusieurs raisons à cela d’une part c’est cher 20 $ juste pour descendre à une chute d’eau. Certes, très belle, les aménagements permettent de prendre de belles photos. Les escaliers sont sur
Deuxième point Négatif. il est difficile de s’y baigner, il y a lde gros rochers donc pas facile du tout d’y accéder, même lorsqu’il n’y a fait pas beaucoup de monde comme c’était aujourd’hui le cas. Enfin, la cascade est tellement puissante qu’il est difficile de faire plus de 3m en direction de la chute d’eau.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Impresionante y espectacular, la mejor que he visto en mi vida y está muy bien cuidada y protegida

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Muy recomendable la visita y el baño, si es posible, pues no siempre se puede uno bañar

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Amazing natural wonder, only the stairs were a bit challenging...careful for the rocks at the falls pool

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
🚨HONEST REVIEW & TIP
💫Waterfall was 100/10. A must see in La Fortuna.
🩴TIP: Watershoes is a MUST to be able to get down to the water, swim and take photos. Not possible without watershoes.
📅Went first week of May

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Hands down one of the best things I did on my trip to CR. We went at opening and only shared the place with a handful of other people. Swimming in the waterfall was absolutely incredible, but you definitely need water shoes because the rocks are very slippery. I was nervous about the stairs going back up, but it surprisingly took us longer to go down than up, it wasn't bad at all.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Esta catarata si que la disfrutéis. A pesar de la bajada, es muy cómoda de bajar y luego subir. Pero lo mejor es que aqui te puedes bañar, y aunque la entrada al agua impresiona porque parece muy fría. Luego te das cuenta que solo es la diferencia de temperatura entre el exterior y la caminata y el interior. Luego te encanta.

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text: Maravilloso

title: Catarata Río Fortuna
text:
